We are looking for a highly skilled full-stack developer to manually recreate a complex web-based product configurator with exact 1:1 behavior, logic, option dependencies, dynamic image changes, and user flow. This is not a simple redesign or approximation — the goal is to fully understand every selection path, conditional rule, and UI state, then rebuild it as a standalone application with identical functionality.



The ideal candidate has strong experience in reverse-engineering front-end logic, rebuilding multi-step configurators, mapping dependencies between options, and delivering production-ready applications with clean architecture. You must be comfortable analyzing a live configurator in depth, clicking through every possible combination, identifying hidden logic, and reproducing the entire experience manually.

title: Content Creator Operations Virtual Assistant
description:

About the Role



I’m a full-time fashion, lifestyle, and hosting content creator looking for a highly organized, proactive **Content Operations Virtual Assistant** to help manage the backend of my business.



This role is focused on **keeping my content, website, YouTube, and newsletter running consistently and smoothly** so I can focus on creating.



If you love systems, organization, and working behind the scenes of a growing personal brand—this is for you.



Key Responsibilities



Content Management & Organization



* Manage content workflow from filming ? editing ? posting

* Organize and track all content using Google Sheets or Notion

* Ensure all content is scheduled and posted on time across platforms



---



YouTube Management



* Upload 2 videos per week (vlogs + fashion content)

* Write SEO-friendly:



  * Titles

  * Descriptions

  * Tags

* Schedule and optimize videos for performance

* Add affiliate links in descriptions



---



Website Management



* Update website weekly with:



  * New blog-style posts

  * Embedded reels and YouTube videos

  * Affiliate links (Amazon, LTK, etc.)

* Keep homepage fresh and aligned with current content



---



Newsletter Management



* Create and schedule a **weekly newsletter**

* Include:



  * Weekly life updates (based on my content)

  * Affiliate links

  * Recent YouTube videos

* Format
s in a clean, elevated, easy-to-read style



---



Editor & Content Coordination



* Communicate with video editors

* Send content for editing

* Track deadlines and follow up

* Request revisions when needed





 ???? Content Tracking & Systems

* Maintain a content tracker with statuses like:

  * Filmed

  * Editing

  * Ready

  * Posted

* Ensure no content is missed or delayed





Requirements



* Previous experience working with **content creators, influencers, or social media brands**

* Strong understanding of:



  * YouTube platform + SEO

  *
 marketing (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Flodesk, etc.)

  * Website platforms (WordPress, Shopify, or similar)

* Extremely organized and detail-oriented

* Strong written English skills (important for newsletters & descriptions)

* Proactive communicator (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

* Ability to meet deadlines consistently





? Bonus Skills (Not Required, But a Plus)



* Experience with Amazon storefronts or LTK

* Basic graphic design (Canva)

* Understanding of affiliate marketing

* Familiarity with fashion/lifestyle content



---



Schedule & Availability



* Part-time to start (with opportunity to grow into full-time)

* Must be available for:



  * Weekly check-ins

  * Daily communication (Slack, WhatsApp, or
)





Tools We Use



* Google Drive

* Google Sheets / Notion

* Slack or WhatsApp

* YouTube Studio

*
 platforms (ConvertKit/Mailchimp/Flodesk)

* Website backend (TBD)



---



Compensation



* Based on experience (please include your hourly or monthly rate)

* Opportunity for long-term growth within the brand



---



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your experience working with content creators or brands

2. Examples of:

   * YouTube channels you’ve managed

   * Newsletters you’ve created

   * Websites you’ve updated

3. Tools you are familiar with

4. Your availability + rate

5. Why you’d be a great fit for this role



**Important:** Please include the word **“ELEVATED”** in your application so I know you read this fully.



What I’m Looking For



Someone who is:



* Organized and takes initiative

* Reliable and consistent

* Detail-oriented

* Excited to grow with a personal brand

* Able to bring structure to a fast-moving creative business

title: Full Stack Developer (Node.js / Vue.js) – Offshore (Full-Time)
description:
We are an established Australian SaaS company in the accounting space, entering an exciting growth phase. Our platform is already in market with a growing client base, and we are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer to help scale and evolve our product.



This is a long-term, full-time opportunity to work on a live, production-grade application — not a greenfield build — where your work will directly impact thousands of users.



About the Role

You will be working on an existing codebase, extending functionality, improving performance, and helping scale the platform as our customer base grows.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys:

Taking ownership of features end-to-end

Working within and improving an existing architecture

Building scalable, maintainable systems



Tech Stack

Backend: Node.js

Frontend: Vue.js

Database: PostgreSQL



Key Responsibilities

Develop and maintain full stack features across the platform

Extend and optimise an existing Node.js backend

Build clean, responsive interfaces using Vue.js

Work with PostgreSQL for data modelling and performance tuning

Identify and address performance bottlenecks as we scale

Collaborate with the Head of Technology on architecture and technical direction

Contribute to sprint planning and ongoing product improvements



Working Arrangement

Full-time position (offshore)

Preferred start time: 10:00 AM Brisbane (AEST) to align with team collaboration

Daily communication via Slack

Regular check-ins:

Daily during onboarding

Structured sprint cadence once established



Reporting Line

You will report directly to the Head of Technology, working closely to shape and scale the product.



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with Node.js in production environments

Solid experience with Vue.js (or similar modern frontend frameworks)

Experience working with PostgreSQL

Proven ability to work with and improve existing codebases

Strong understanding of scalable application design

Comfortable working remotely with distributed teams

Good written and verbal English communication skills



Nice to Have

Experience with SaaS platforms (especially in finance/accounting)

Familiarity with performance optimisation and scaling systems

Experience working in agile/sprint environments



Why Join Us

Work on a real product with real users

Be part of a growing Australian tech company

Direct access to technical leadership and decision-making

Long-term stability and meaningful work



Important Notes

This is an individual contributor role — no agencies please

Applicants must be available to work aligned with Australian business hours (AEST)

title: Content Growth & Creator Partnerships Specialist
description:

• Germany (secondary focus) 



Your Responsibilities



Content-Focused Partnerships



Source and onboard:

• Creators 

• Influencers 

• Publishers 



With the goal of:



• Producing content for our social media channels 

• Securing barter deals (product in exchange for content) 

• Building long-term creator relationships 



Content Growth Strategy



• Develop a clear strategy to increase the volume of content 

• Focus on scalable content acquisition through partnerships 

• Ensure a consistent flow of new creatives for social media 



Market Focus

Performance & Reporting (Bi-weekly)

Compensation

To Apply, send us:

And include the word "Long term" in your subject line.

$4–$6/hour

title: Funnel Builder – eCommerce (Beauty/Wellness Niche)
description:
NOW HIRING: eCommerce Funnel Builder – Health & Beauty Industry





Are you ready to elevate your skills and make a real impact with a fast-growing Beauty & Health eCommerce brand? We’re looking for a hands-on Funnel Builder who can build and optimize high-converting sales funnels using Funnelish.



You’ll play a key role in shaping our customer journey, ensuring every funnel is strategically designed to drive performance. Plus, earning up to $100 bonus per funnel, your hard work directly translates into extra earnings!





Your Role:

-Build, test, and refine funnels to improve user experience and conversions

-Create effective funnels using Funnelish, aligned with KPIs

-Troubleshoot issues quickly and independently

- Regular analysis and tweaking of funnels based on performance data.

-Earn up to $100 in bonuses per funnel that meets performance benchmarks





What We’re Looking For:

-Proven experience in funnel building, using Funnelish

-Background in eCommerce, preferably dropshipping

-Strong problem-solving skills and ability to manage multiple projects

-Ability to implement solutions quickly and with minimal supervision

-Clear communicator and strong team player



How to Apply:

To apply, please send your portfolio showcasing relevant funnel-building work.

To confirm your attention to detail, include the color turquoise a in your application.





To be considered, please answer the following:

How much time do you typically spend building an advertorial page and a sales page in these two scenarios:

1. From scratch

2. Using a template

Include your estimated time for each, and briefly explain your process.

Tell me in detail about your usage and experience with Funnelish.



Ready to embark on this exciting journey with us? Apply today and be a part of our growth and success!

title: Local SEO Specialist (Google Maps Ranking Expert)
description:
Local SEO Specialist (Google Maps Ranking Expert) + WordPress/Elementor + AI + Website Admin — Full-Time



PRIMARY ROLE:

Rank local businesses in the Google Maps 3-Pack (Map Pack). If you cannot show proof of Map Pack rankings, do NOT apply.



------------------------------------------------------------



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



Google Maps / Local SEO (Top Priority)

- Rank Google Business Profiles (GBP) in the Map Pack

- Improve Google Maps ranking performance using Local Falcon or Local Viking grid tracking

- Optimize categories, services, posts, attributes, and photos

- Fix NAP/citation inconsistencies

- Resolve duplicates, spam listings, and suspensions

- Rank competitive U.S. home-service niches (plumbing, roofing, concrete, HVAC, electrical, and other contractor services)



WordPress + Elementor (Supports Local SEO)

- Build or update service and city pages

- Improve Core Web Vitals and site speed

- Fix plugin, hosting, DNS, and SSL issues

- Optimize silo structure and internal linking for SEO



Website Maintenance / Administration

- Update plugins, themes, and WordPress core

- Manage backups and restoration points

- Monitor uptime and fix site errors

- Handle DNS, SSL, and hosting tasks

- Resolve plugin conflicts and performance issues

- Improve caching, CDN configurations, and overall site stability



AI Skills (Required)

- Perform Local SEO audits and identify ranking issues

- Troubleshoot technical issues (speed, CLS/LCP, plugin conflicts, Elementor errors)

- Generate and validate schema (JSON-LD)

- Improve workflow efficiency (SOPs, QA, audits)

- Support content creation (service pages, city pages, GBP posts, FAQs)



SOP Execution

- Follow detailed SOPs accurately

- Maintain consistency across a large volume of websites

- Create or update SOPs when needed

- Use AI to improve SOPs and workflows

- Document steps clearly

- Maintain high quality and consistency at scale



Leadership and Training

- Guide or train junior tea
mbers when needed

- Help others follow SOPs

- Delegate simple tasks

- Provide clear instructions and feedback

- Support a collaborative, results-focused environment



------------------------------------------------------------



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

- Minimum 3 years of Local SEO experience

- Proven Map Pack ranking results (must show evidence)

- Strong WordPress and Elementor skills

- Website maintenance and admin experience

- Strong AI skills (audits, troubleshooting, schema, workflows, content)

- Comfortable training or guiding tea
mbers

- Excellent English

- Full-time availability (40 hours per week)

- Stable power and internet setup



------------------------------------------------------------



FULL-TIME — FIXED MONTHLY SALARY

Include your expected monthly salary (USD) in your Loom video.



------------------------------------------------------------

APPLICATION PROCESS:

LOOM VIDEO REQUIRED (10–15 minutes)

Applications without a Loom video will NOT be considered.



PART 1 — DESCRIBE

- Your name and location

- Years of Local SEO experience

- Your exact role in past Local SEO or Map Pack projects

  (Were you solo or part of a team? What tasks were you responsible for?)

- Your step-by-step Google Maps ranking strategy

- Your experience training or guiding tea
mbers

- Expected monthly salary (USD)



PART 2 — SHOW (Screen Share Required)

- 2–3 Google Business Profiles you personally ranked

- Local Falcon or Local Viking grids before and after

  (Explain what you did to improve the results)

- A WordPress or Elementor website you worked on

- Your website maintenance/admin work, including:

  - Plugins

  - Backups

  - Hosting panel (cPanel, Cloudways, etc.)

  - SSL and DNS tasks

- How you use AI for:

  - Local SEO audits

  - Technical troubleshooting

  - Schema generation

  - Content support



------------------------------------------------------------



ABOUT US

We are a U.S.-based digital marketing company specializing in lead generation for the home services industry. We build, grow, and maintain a large portfolio of websites and online assets focused on strong performance, search visibility, and user experience. As we continue to expand our digital footprint, we are looking for skilled, long-term tea
mbers who can help us create new sites, improve existing ones, strengthen SEO strategies, and support our growth initiatives. Our team works remotely, follows clear SOPs, and uses AI to improve efficiency and accuracy across all workflows.

title: Funnel Builder wanted for 7-figure Fast Growing Health & Beauty Ecommerce Store

title: Senior Video Editor (e-commerce Brand Experience REQUIRED)
description:
Senior Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $10–$16+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $250 per video!!



- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (3-5 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $250 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $10-$16 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: AI Image Specialist
description:
At Magic Story, we harness the power of AI to create a brighter future for kids. Our mission is to empower children by making them the heroes of their own stories with personalized, high-quality content that fosters learning and growth. Our team — a unique blend of Silicon Valley technologists and Hollywood creatives — is dedicated to transforming kids' media. We're expanding and seeking a multifaceted visual expert to help deliver uniquely personalized storybooks to children around the world through a creative yet highly structured image production workflow.



**Position Overview:**



Magic Story is seeking a highly skilled AI Prompt Engineer & Image Editing Specialist. This unique role combines technical expertise in AI prompt engineering with advanced digital image editing and post-production. The ideal candidate is a digital Swiss Army knife and AI wizard — someone who can generate, evaluate, and refine AI-generated imagery while ensuring that each storybook page is visually polished, avatar-accurate, and emotionally compelling. Familiarity with traditional Photoshop techniques alongside new AI editing tools is essential. Experience with tools like Midjourney, GPT, and Sora is highly valued.



This is a detail-oriented and fast-paced role, with each day revolving around fulfilling personalized customer orders. Candidates should be excited by structured creative work, have a passion for visual accuracy, and thrive in a high-variation production pipeline where quality and efficiency go hand-in-hand.



**Video Introduction Requirement:**



All applicants must submit a short (1–2 minute) video introduction as part of their application. Please introduce yourself, describe your relevant experience, and explain why you’re a great fit for this role. Upload your video to YouTube (unlisted) or Google Drive (shareable link) and include the link in your application. This is required to assess your English fluency and communication skills.



**Key Responsibilities:**



**AI Prompt Engineering & Image Generation:**



- Develop and refine prompts for AI-generated images to ensure high-quality, consistent, and story-appropriate visual outputs.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI image generation tools and techniques (e.g., Midjourney, GPT, Sora) to continually improve output quality.

- Collaborate with the creative team to translate story concepts and character descriptions into visually captivating AI-generated images.



**Image Selection & Post-Production:**



- Review sets of AI-generated images for each story page and select the image that best matches the customer's child's avatar and the scene description.

- Use Adobe Photoshop (and similar tools) to retouch and enhance selected images: adjusting colors (e.g., matching eye and hair color to the child’s photo), correcting any distortions or anomalies (such as extra limbs or other artifacts from AI generation), and improving overall image quality.

- Leverage Photoshop’s AI-powered features (like Generative Fill) alongside traditional editing techniques to remove unwanted artifacts and seamlessly integrate the child's avatar into each illustration.

- Ensure visual consistency and excellence across all pages of the personalized book, so that the child’s character looks consistent and polished throughout the story.



**Workflow & Quality Assurance:**



- Manage the end-to-end image personalization process for each book order, ensuring all orders are completed and delivered on time.

- Work efficiently in a fast-paced environment with unpredictable order volumes – some days may bring a high volume of orders, while other days are lighter.

- Communicate clearly with the team (e.g., writers, designers, customer support) to address any issues and ensure the final product meets our quality standards and the customer's expectations.

- Keep organized records of orders and assets, and contribute to improving the personalization pipeline (suggest new tools, techniques, or process tweaks to enhance efficiency and quality).



**Qualifications:**



**Image Editing Expertise:** Proven experience in image editing, retouching, or photo post-production, with expert-level skills in Adobe Photoshop (color correction, compositing, masking, healing, etc.).



**AI Tool Proficiency:** Hands-on experience with AI image-generation tools (such as Midjourney, Sora, DALL·E, GPT, etc.) and familiarity with crafting effective prompts to achieve desired visual results.



**Attention to Detail:** A keen eye for visual details – able to spot and correct subtle discrepancies in images (e.g., mismatched eye color, artifacts, awkward proportions) to achieve a natural and consistent look.



**Creative Problem-Solving:** Ability to think critically and creatively when faced with imperfect AI outputs, finding solutions through prompt adjustments or digital editing to produce the best possible imagery.



**Tech-Savvy & Adaptable:** Strong understanding of AI technologies (including how generative models work) and enthusiasm for continuously learning new tools or features in this fast-evolving field.



**Communication & Teamwork:** Excellent communication skills (fluent in English) and a collaborative attitude. Comfortable working in a remote team, asking questions, and giving updates to ensure smooth workflow.



**Time Management:** Proven ability to manage time effectively in a dynamic environment, balancing multiple orders/projects and meeting deadlines consistently.



**Bonus Skills (Optional):** Familiarity with 3D modeling/animation or graphic design is a plus. Experience with coding or web/eCommerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, WordPress) is also a bonus, though not required.



**Compensation & Benefits:**



- Flat monthly rate of **$1,200 USD** (full-time contractor role)

- Remote work with flexible working hours

- Opportunity to work with a creative, dynamic team passionate about storytelling and technology

- Access to the latest AI tools and technologies to support your work and professional growth

- The chance to shape the future of children’s storytelling by delivering magical, personalized experiences to young readers

- Optional 13th month bonus based on performance

- Paid Philippine national holidays



**How to Apply:**



Interested candidates are invited to submit their resume, portfolio, and a video introduction to 
 your application, please detail your experience with AI image generation and Photoshop editing. Include a portfolio that features before-and-after image edits or AI-generated artwork you’ve helped enhance. Please also provide the required video introduction as a YouTube (unlisted) or Google Drive link.



Magic Story is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.



**Join us in creating the next generation of magical storytelling!**

title: Product Listing & Social Media Marketing Specialist (Shopify + Canva)
description:
Nerdzoic is a fast-growing U.S.-based collectible toy retailer operating both e-commerce and physical retail. We manage over 5,000 active SKUs, nearly 20,000 product variants, and add 5–50 new products daily. This is a high-volume, detail-intensive environment where organization, speed, and accuracy are critical.



We are hiring an experienced Shopify and Canva specialist to manage product listings, marketing graphics, social media posting, and basic
 campaigns. This role will begin part-time at 20 hours per week, with a clear path to increased hours and eventual full-time growth based on performance and company expansion.



Compensation for this role is ?500–?550 per hour based on proven experience. A paid trial project (5–10 hours) is required before final hiring. A performance review will be conducted after 90 days with opportunity for increased hours and compensation based on results.



This is not an entry-level role. You must already be confident navigating the Shopify backend, managing variants and metafields, maintaining clean taxonomy, and working inside structured systems at scale. You should not require step-by-step hand-holding. You are expected to take brief prompts and independently gather the necessary details (from
s, vendor information, product pages, and research) to complete the work correctly.



A typical instruction might be: “New Marvel Legends wave tomorrow. Info coming via
. 7 SKUs.” From that brief prompt, you should be able to extract the product data, research missing information, create accurate Shopify listings, assign correct collections, tags, and product types, set metafields properly to maintain taxonomy, design promotional graphics in Canva, draft basic marketing copy, and schedule posts or campaigns accordingly.



Core responsibilities include creating and optimizing product listings, managing SKU and variant structures, maintaining consistent taxonomy (collections, tags, product types, and metafields), ensuring listings go live the same day they are assigned (unless a different date is specified), and protecting data accuracy across thousands of products. You will also design clean, on-brand promotional graphics in Canva, write captions, and schedule posts using Metricool while keeping visual output consistent across platforms. For
 marketing, you will monitor our receiving log and inventory levels and launch template-based MailerLite campaigns when product arrives, using approved templates and writing clear, concise promotional copy that matches our brand voice.



Over time, this role is expected to grow into ownership of website content, digital merchandising, and marketing execution.



Strong English communication skills, proven Shopify backend experience, Canva design ability, independence, reliability, and comfort with fast-paced direct communication are non-negotiable. You must have at least one hour of overlap with U.S. Eastern morning time daily and be available for full U.S. hours approximately 5–10 times per year for major release/event days.



To Apply:  Record a 3–5 minute Loom video introducing yourself. In the video:



- Start by telling us your favorite toy line growing up.

- Explain your Shopify backend experience.

- Explain your Canva experience.

- Describe a large catalog or structured system you have managed.



Send links to:



- Shopify stores you’ve worked on

- Canva designs you’ve created

- Social media accounts you’ve managed (if applicable)

-Confirm your hourly rate expectation within the posted range and your weekly availability.



Applications that do not follow all instructions exactly will not be reviewed.

description:
About the Company

We install premium permanent outdoor LED lighting systems on homes across the United States. Think custom-color Christmas lights that stay up year-round — except high-end, professionally installed, and built to last a lifetime. Our customers pay $3,000–$10,000 for their systems and expect a premium experience from start to finish. We're a fast-growing company and we take care of the people on our team.



What You'll Be Doing

This role has two main responsibilities:

1. Roof Measurements (approx. 2–3 hours per morning/afternoon)



Using EagleView and RoofSnap (we'll train you), pull roof measurements for upcoming sales appointments

Calculate linear footage per side of the home using a simple formula we'll teach you

Enter measurements into our CRM (HighLevel) before each appointment's start time — this is time-sensitive and directly tied to your bonus

Handle edge cases like new builds and late appointment confirmations

Flag anything that doesn't look right rather than guessing



2. Customer Inbound Support (remaining hours)



Respond to customer messages in our CRM via text and

Answer inbound phone calls from customers asking about their installation timeline, materials status, or general questions

Look up project status in our systems and give clear, accurate updates

De-escalate frustrated customers calmly and professionally — we'll give you scripts and context

Log notes and escalate anything you can't resolve



This is detail-oriented, process-driven work. We have documented SOPs for everything. You won't be figuring things out on your own — you'll be following a clear system and flagging when something falls outside of it.



Compensation

Base pay: $5.00/hr

Performance bonuses — paid:



Measurements Deadline Bonus: You earn a bonus for every appointment where measurements are uploaded before the appointment start time. Miss the deadline, no bonus. 

Call Answer Rate Bonus: You earn a bonus based on the percentage of inbound customer calls you answer during your shift. We track this.  Targets and bonus amounts will be shared during the interview.



We built the bonus structure this way intentionally — if you're reliable and consistent, you make meaningfully more than the base rate. If you're not, the base is what you get. We want someone who sees the bonus as the norm, not the exception.



You're a Great Fit If You:



Have experience in customer support (phone and chat) — 2+ years preferred

Are extremely reliable and show up on time, every day

Communicate clearly in written and spoken English

Can follow a multi-step process accurately without skipping steps

Are comfortable learning new software tools (we'll train you — but you need to be a fast learner)

Have a stable internet connection and a quiet place to take calls

Are available to start your shift by 6:00 a.m. EST





You're Not a Fit If You:



Need constant supervision to complete routine tasks

Have unreliable internet or frequent power outages with no backup

Are looking for a short-term gig — we want someone long-term

Skip instructions in job applications (more on that below)





The Details



Pay: $5/hr base + performance bonuses

Hours: Part-time to start (~20 hrs/week), with the opportunity to grow to full-time as you prove yourself

Schedule: Monday–Sunday, morning shift aligned to US Central/Eastern time

Equipment: You must have your own computer and reliable internet. A headset for calls is required.

Start date: As soon as the right person is found





How to Apply

We receive a lot of applications. To make sure we find the right person, we ask everyone to complete a short Google Form before we consider your application. It takes about 5 minutes.

Do not send a message here asking for more information. Do not send a resume attachment. Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.



Click the link below to apply:





If you can follow that one simple instruction, you're already ahead of most applicants.

title: Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor

Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor

This role is ideal for someone who is strong in graphic design, social media visuals, short-form video editing, and content support and wants a stable long-term opportunity with room to grow.



You will support a fast-moving business ecosystem led by the CEO of Innovative Global Entities (IGE), a multi-brand company involved in business education, media, publishing, podcasting, and digital marketing. Our brands include Get Biz Credit, Reimagine iT Inc., Excel Media Group, Affluential Magazine, Mind Your Business Podcast, and more.



What You’ll Be Doing



Your main focus will be helping us create and prepare high-quality branded content for social media, promotions, podcast marketing, and online publishing.



Main Responsibilities

Social media formatting for Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube

Basic WordPress editing

Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets

Good written English



Experience with InDesign is a plus. Experience with podcast content is also a plus. Your current ad requires Photoshop, InDesign, After Effects, WordPress, Teams, PowerPoint, and publishing tools, which likely narrows the pool too aggressively for the compensation.



Who We Want



We are looking for someone who is:



Creative and visually strong

Reliable and responsive

Stable internet connection

Available full-time

Pay & Benefits

$5/hour USD

Opportunity for raises based on performance

Long-term growth opportunity for the right person

Why This Is a Great Opportunity

Stable, full-time remote role

Work on exciting brands in media, publishing, business, and podcasting

Opportunity to grow into a larger creative role

Direct support from leadership

Long-term position for someone dependable and talented

How to Apply



Please send the following to

Application – Graphic Designer & Social Media Content Editor

IMPORTANT NOTE:

description:
Job Title: GTM Engineer / CRM Builder (Remote – Full Time)



Overview  

We’re looking for a highly skilled and systems-driven GTM Engineer / CRM Builder to join our team. This role is perfect for someone who loves building scalable outbound and CRM systems from scratch, optimizing workflows, and continuously improving performance through automation.



You’ll be responsible for designing, building, and managing our go-to-market infrastructure — including CRM setup, outbound automation, and data flows. We value people who think in systems, not just tasks.



---



Key Responsibilities  

- Build and manage CRM systems (primarily Attio, but open to alternatives)  

- Design and implement outbound systems across
 and LinkedIn  

- Set up and optimize tools like Bitscale, Aimfox, Smartlead, and similar platforms  

- Automate workflows for lead sourcing, enrichment, outreach, and follow-ups  

- Maintain and improve data quality, segmentation, and reporting  

- Continuously test and optimize outbound campaigns for performance  

- Troubleshoot system issues and improve efficiency across the stack  

- Document systems and processes for scalability  



---



Requirements  

- Proven experience building and managing CRM systems (Attio experience strongly preferred)  

- Strong understanding of outbound systems (cold
 + LinkedIn automation)  

- Hands-on experience with tools like Smartlead, Bitscale, Aimfox, or similar  

- Ability to design end-to-end GTM systems (lead sourcing ? outreach ? tracking)  

- Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, APIs, or similar)  

- Strong problem-solving skills and systems thinking mindset  

- Detail-oriented with a focus on clean, scalable builds  



---



Nice to Have  

- Experience with data enrichment tools (e.g., Apollo, Clearbit, Clay)  

- Familiarity with deliverability best practices  

- Basic understanding of sales funnels and GTM strategy  

- Experience working in startups or fast-paced environments  



---



What We’re Looking For  

- Someone who doesn’t just use tools — but builds systems  

- A self-starter who can take ownership and improve what already exists  

- Someone who is proactive, organized, and obsessed with efficiency  

- Open to experimenting with new tools and approaches  



---



Why Join Us  

- Fully remote role  

- Future bonus scheme 

- Opportunity to build and own a complete GTM system  

- Work with a fast-moving, growth-focused team  

- Flexibility and autonomy in how you build  



---



If you’re passionate about systems, automation, and building high-performance outbound engines, we’d love to hear from you.

You will work with real financial data across payment processors, banks, advertising platforms, and suppliers. Your work directly impacts how well the company understands its numbers and makes decisions.



If you are detail-oriented, structured, and comfortable working with data, this is a strong opportunity to build real experience in e-commerce finance.

Daily Financial Tracking

title: Ad Creative Motion Designer
description:
We are looking for a part-time Ad Creative Motion Designer to help us recreate high-performing ad formats for an AI-powered body analysis and fitness coaching startup.

--

Your main job is to study a reference ad, understand exactly how it works, and then rebuild the same style and structure using our own scripts, texts, images, voice-over, and branding assets.

--

This is not a generic video editing role.

--

We need someone who can reverse-engineer an ad format and reproduce:

 pacing

 narrative structure

 transitions

 subtitle style

 visual hook

 scene-by-scene flow

 layout and visual hierarchy

--

You must be able to look at a Meta ad reference and recreate the editing logic very closely using our own assets.

This position starts as a 1-month part-time contract.



 If the collaboration goes well, there may be a full-time opportunity afterward.

--

What you will do

Study reference ads fro
ta ad libraries

 Analyze whether the ad can realistically be recreated with the assets provided

 Confirm feasibility before starting production

 Recreate the ad structure as closely as possible using our own assets

 Match the pacing, rhythm, transitions, subtitle style, hook logic, and scene sequencing

 Edit and organize deliverables for multiple aspect ratios

 Export final files cleanly and keep source files organized

 Occasionally make simple visual cutouts or retouching when needed

 Implement feedback quickly and accurately

--

Formats

You will create ads in:

 9:16

 1:1

 4:5

 16:9

--

Video length will typically range from:

 60 seconds

 up to 2 minutes

--

Expected initial volume:

 around 20 to 30 videos over the first month

--

What we need from you

Strong motion design and ad editing skills

 Ability to recreate a reference ad format very closely

 Strong attention to detail

 Strong understanding of ad hooks, retention, direct-response editing, and Meta or TikTok performance creatives

 Good to very good written English

 Ability to understand references in English without needing excessive explanation

 Ability to follow visual instructions, written instructions, and Loom feedback

 Fast turnaround and good responsiveness

--

Important

Before starting any ad, you must be able to clearly say one of these two things:

 “Yes, I can reproduce this format accurately”

 or

 “No, this cannot be matched properly with the current assets”

--

If you are not confident that you can match the reference closely, you must say so before production starts.

We prefer honesty and precision over guessing.

--

Preferred background

We strongly prefer candidates with experience in one or more of these areas:

 beauty

 skincare

 face analysis

 AI products

 fitness, health, or aesthetics offers

 performance marketing creatives

--

Tools

You can use the tools you are strongest with, as long as the output quality is excellent.

However, we are not looking for candidates who work only with Canva or CapCut mobile.

A professional editing workflow is expected.

--

Deliverables

You must provide:

 final MP4 exports

 source project files

 organized working files

--

All files will be shared and managed through Google Drive.

--

Working setup

Part-time

 4 hours per day

 5 days per week

 1-month trial to start

 Partial overlap with Dubai time is preferred

--

Expected pace:

 first draft within 24 hours when assigned

 then 1 to 2 videos per day depending on complexity

 fast same-day iterations when needed

--

Compensation

$400/month

 Part-time

 Trial starts with a test project

 There is a full-time opportunity for the right person

--

Revisions

We expect someone who can integrate feedback quickly and accurately.

Revisions are not formally capped, but they must stay within reason.

--

 We want someone who understands feedback fast and does not need the same explanation multiple times.

Paid test

Shortlisted candidates will complete one test ad.

Test format

You will receive one reference ad and our own text, script, and assets.

 You will first analyze whether the ad is realistically reproducible.

 Then you will create one recreated version using our assets.

Test payment

$30, paid only if the result matches the brief very closely.

--

What we evaluate

Fidelity to the reference style

 Execution speed

 Clean editing

 Attention to detail

 Ability to follow instructions exactly

--

How to apply

Please send:

 3 to 5 ad examples

 At least 1 beauty, skincare, face, or aesthetic-related example

 A Google Drive, Loom, or portfolio link

--

For each example, briefly explain:

 what part you personally made

 which tools you used

 how long it took you

--

At the beginning of your application, write the word:

 PRECISION

--

Applications without this keyword will be ignored.

--

Please also answer these 5 questions in your application:

Have you already recreated ads from a reference video before?

Which software do you use most for this kind of work?

Can you match a style very closely, including pacing, subtitles, transitions, and structure?

Have you worked on beauty, skincare, face, fitness, or AI-related ads before?

What is your typical turnaround time for a 60 to 120-second ad?

--

Please do not apply if:

 you only edit with Canva or mobile apps

 you cannot closely recreate a reference ad style

 you struggle with written English instructions

 you need very detailed hand-holding on every edit

 your portfolio does not include performance-style ads

--

We are looking for someone who is precise, visually sharp, fast, reliable, detail-oriented, comfortable with performance ad formats, and capable of recreating an ad style with a very high level of fidelity.

This is a strong fit for someone who enjoys breaking down winning creatives and rebuilding them with discipline.

Payment



 **$800/month**

title: Zapier, Real Estate, and Lead Gen Assistant - 20260322
description:
Must answer all questions in job description.  Candidate who do not read through details and apply without ansewr to the evaluation questions will not be contacted.



About the Role

I am a realtor and interior designer based in Canada seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Remote Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support daily operations. This role is ideal for someone experienced in zapier automation with customization and some custom code editing, real estate research, data organization, scheduling, and marketing support. You will work closely with me to help streamline operations, transactions, research properties, and maintain marketing activities.



Key Responsibilities

- Experience in setting up task automation usng Zapier or Maker



2. Property Research

- Search for properties based on specific client criteria using MLS and other real estate platforms

- Compile property lists for buyers and investment opportunities

- Monitor new listings and notify the realtor of relevant opportunities



3. Price & Market Analysis

- Conduct competitive market analysis (CMA) on comparable properties

- Research recent sales, active listings, and neighborhood trends

- Prepare organized reports and spreadsheets summarizing market data



4. Appointment Coordination

- Schedule property showings, meetings, and client appointments

- Coordinate calendars and confirm appointments with clients and vendors

- Send reminders and maintain organized schedules



5. Marketing Support

- Assist with social media posting and online marketing campaigns

- Prepare listing marketing materials (flyers, brochures,
 campaigns)

- Support CRM updates and lead tracking

- Help organize open house marketing and follow-ups



6. Administrative Support

- Maintain property and client databases

- Organize documents and files related to listings and transactions

- Assist with basic
 communication and task coordination





Qualifications

- Previous experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant is a must; not just property management

- Familiarity with Zapier a must

- Strong research and data organization skills

- Familiarity with real estate terminology and basic market analysis

- Experience with spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel)

- Experience with CRM systems and marketing tools is a plus

- Strong written English communication skills

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines but also able to collaborate in team environment and do zoo
etings daily



Preferred Skills

- Experience with web develop tools and process automation tools a must

- Experience working with North American real estate agents preferred

- Knowledge of MLS systems, Zillow, or similar platforms

- Graphic design experience (Canva or similar tools)

- Familiarity of AI assisted content generation: writing, images, and video

- Social media management experience (Instagram,
, LinkedIn)



Compensation

- fixed pay; will not consider hourly

- Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



How to Apply, Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A short introduction about your experience working on Zapier

3. A short introduction about your experience working with real estate agents

4. Portfolio examples of any automation, real estate, marketing work, administrative support, website work you have done

title: Website Manager (WordPress / Next.js / SEO)
description:
About Us



We are The Dog House Pet Salon, a Houston-based pet services company with 3 grooming locations and a pet technology platform called My Pet Credentials. We manage multiple web properties including WordPress sites (with Elementor), a Next.js website, and various business listings across Google, Yelp, and other platforms. We need someone who can keep everything running smoothly, optimize our search visibility, and manage content across all of our digital properties.



We are a family-run business that values reliability, initiative, and attention to detail.



What You Will Do



- Manage and update our WordPress websites using Elementor page builder

- Make content updates, publish blog posts, and maintain page accuracy across all web properties

- Perform on-page SEO optimization (meta titles, descriptions, headings, internal linking, image alt text)

- Monitor and improve technical SEO (page speed, Core Web Vitals, crawl errors, sitemap, robots.txt)

- Manage local SEO for 3 physical locations (Google Business Profiles, Yelp, Apple Maps, local citations)

- Use Google Search Console and Google Analytics to track performance and identify issues

- Make minor content updates to our Next.js website (text, images, basic component edits)

- Monitor website uptime and respond to issues (slow load times, broken pages, SSL certificates)

- Coordinate with developers when technical fixes are needed beyond content management

- Use AI tools to research SEO opportunities, draft content, and diagnose website issues



Skills Required



- 2+ years of WordPress management experience (content updates, plugin management, basic troubleshooting)

- Experience with Elementor or similar visual page builders

- Working knowledge of on-page and technical SEO

- Experience with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

- Understanding of local SEO (Google Business Profile optimization, NAP consistency, local citations)

- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS (enough to make minor edits and troubleshoot layout issues)

- Strong written English for content management and blog posts

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple properties simultaneously

- Comfortable using AI tools for research, content drafting, and problem diagnosis



Nice to Have



- Experience with Next.js or React-based websites (even basic familiarity)

- Knowledge of structured data / JSON-LD markup

- Experience managing Google Ads or social media accounts

- Familiarity with cPanel, Plesk, or similar hosting control panels

- Basic image editing skills (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)



Why Join Us



- Long-term, stable position with a company that has been serving the Houston community for years

- Clear, well-defined responsibilities -- no ambiguity about what success looks like

- Opportunity to grow into a broader digital marketing role as the company expands

- Competitive pay with annual raises based on performance

- Supportive team that provides context and training, not just task lists

- Work across a variety of platforms and properties -- no two days are exactly the same



How to Apply



Send your application with:

1. A brief introduction about yourself and your WordPress/SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have managed (URLs if possible)

3. One specific SEO improvement you made on a past project and the result

4. Your experience with Google Business Profile management



Qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short online skills assessment (approximately 60 minutes). You will diagnose website issues, perform an SEO audit on our actual website, and walk through an emergency response scenario. AI tools are welcome -- we want to see how you think, not memorize.



Work Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours per week. We are flexible on exact hours but expect overlap with US Central Time (Houston, TX) for team communication.



Payment: Paid bi-weekly or monthly via your preferred method (Wise, PayPal, direct bank transfer).



Equipment: You provide your own computer and internet connection. We provide access to all necessary software, accounts, and AI tool subscriptions.



We use AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor) as a standard part of our workflow. We are looking for people who know how to use AI effectively and know when it is wrong.

title: Frontend Developer (Next.js / React / Tailwind CSS)
description:
About Us



We are The Dog House Pet Salon, a Houston-based pet services company with 3 grooming locations and a growing pet technology platform called My Pet Credentials. We build websites and web applications that serve pet owners, groomers, veterinarians, and rescue organizations. Our tech stack is modern -- Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS -- and we use AI tools as a core part of our development process.



Our team is small, collaborative, and results-driven. We care more about what you can build than where you went to school.



What You Will Do



- Build responsive, accessible UI components using React and Next.js

- Implement designs from Figma mockups using Tailwind CSS

- Create and maintain component-based architecture (reusable cards, forms, navigation, dashboards)

- Build pages for our pet salon website (
) and MPC web dashboard

- Handle form validation, state management, and client-side logic

- Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile-first responsive design

- Work with AI tools (Cursor, Copilot, Claude) to accelerate development -- and review AI output for quality

- Debug UI issues including layout shifts, styling inconsistencies, and accessibility problems

- Collaborate with backend developers to integrate API data into frontend views



Skills Required



- Strong experience with React (functional components, hooks, state management)

- Working knowledge of Next.js (pages/app router, SSR/SSG basics)

- Proficiency in Tailwind CSS or similar utility-first CSS framework

- Solid HTML/CSS fundamentals -- you can build responsive layouts without a framework if needed

- Experience converting designs (Figma, PSD, or similar) into pixel-accurate code

- Understanding of web accessibility (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, semantic HTML)

- Experience using AI coding tools and ability to evaluate AI-generated UI code

- Git and GitHub for version control



Nice to Have



- Experience with dark mode implementation

- Animation libraries (Framer Motion, CSS transitions)

- TypeScript

- SEO-friendly frontend practices (meta tags, structured data, performance optimization)

- Experience with component libraries or design systems



Why Join Us



- Long-term position -- we are building for years, not months

- Modern tech stack that keeps your skills current and marketable

- AI-first development culture -- learn to work with AI tools effectively

- Competitive pay with room for raises as you grow with us

- Direct ownership of visible, user-facing features

- Friendly, supportive team that values clear communication and quality work



How to Apply



Send your application with:

1. A brief introduction about yourself

2. Links to 2-3 React projects you have built (live sites, GitHub repos, or portfolio)

3. Your experience with Tailwind CSS and responsive design

4. Which AI coding tools you have used and how they fit into your workflow



Qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short online skills assessment (approximately 75 minutes, open-book, AI tools encouraged). You will build a component, debug a UI, and convert a design to code -- practical tasks that reflect the actual work.



Work Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours per week. We are flexible on exact hours but expect overlap with US Central Time (Houston, TX) for team communication.



Payment: Paid bi-weekly or monthly via your preferred method (Wise, PayPal, direct bank transfer).



Equipment: You provide your own computer and internet connection. We provide access to all necessary software, accounts, and AI tool subscriptions.



We use AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor) as a standard part of our workflow. We are looking for people who know how to use AI effectively and know when it is wrong.

title: YouTube/Instagram/TikTok etc Creative Assistant
description:
We are looking for a high-level YouTube Creative Assistant to help launch and grow a YouTube channel from the ground up.



This is not just a video editing role.



You will manage the full lifecycle of content from idea to final video, including research, scripting, editing, and publishing.



If you understand what makes people click, stay, and engage on YouTube, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Content Strategy and Ideation

Research what content is currently performing well and identify opportunities to capitalize on

Analyze competitors, trends, and keyword gaps using tools like TubeBuddy, VidIQ, or YouTube

Create 3 to 5 strong video ideas before filming, including titles and thumbnail direction



2. Scriptwriting and Storytelling

Write engaging 10-to-20-minute scripts that feel natural and conversational

Structure videos for high retention using strong hooks in the first 30 seconds

Use open loops and clear calls to action throughout

Include visual direction such as B roll, on screen text, and pattern interrupts



3. Video Editing and Repurposing

Edit high quality YouTube videos with strong pacing and clean transitions

Turn long form content into short form videos for Shorts, TikTok, and Reels

Use music, sound effects, and proper audio balancing to enhance quality



4. Uploading and Optimization

Handle the full upload process including titles, descriptions, tags, and pinned comments

Apply SEO strategies to improve reach and performance

Use tools like ChatGPT or Descript to improve speed and efficiency



What We’re Looking For



Strong scriptwriting skills with natural, human sounding content

Experience with editing software such as Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

Understanding of YouTube retention and viewer engagement

A portfolio that shows strong storytelling and editing ability

Strong English communication skills and ability to work remotely

Someone who stays updated on trends and is always improving



Compensation and Structure



Payments sent weekly or monthly via Wise or another agreed method

Long term, stable position

Growth opportunities as the business expands

Performance based bonuses available



How to Apply



Please send the following:



1 Your resume or CV

2 A short introduction about yourself and why you are a good fit

3 A screenshot of your internet speed test

4 Work Examples



Important Application Test



Include the number 58at the end of your name in the subject line



Example:

YouTube Creative Assistant VA John Dough 101



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered



If you want, I can also tighten this into a shorter version for OnlineJobs.ph so it converts better.

title: After-Sales Service
description:
# Customer Service Representative — Health & Wellness E-commerce



**Position:** Full-time  

**Industry:** DTC E-commerce · Dietary Supplements



---



## About Us



We're a fast-growing e-commerce company specializing in dietary supplements and wellness products. We operate a portfolio of brands sold directly to consumers via Shopify, with customer acquisition driven primarily through Meta Ads.



## The Role



You'll be the voice of our brands. Your job is to deliver a flawless customer experience across all our brands, handling incoming requests across multiple channels and turning every interaction into a retention opportunity.



## Responsibilities



**Multichannel Customer Support**

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, and social media DMs (Instagram,
, TikTok)

- Handle order tracking, returns, refunds, and complaints

- Maintain fast response times and a professional tone tailored to each brand



**Order Management & After-Sales**

- Process order modifications, cancellations, and exchanges in Shopify

- Coordinate with fulfillment partners to resolve shipping issues

- Manage customer subscriptions (modifications, pauses, cancellations)



**Continuous Improvement**

- Flag recurring customer feedback to help improve products and communication

- Build and maintain canned responses and FAQ documentation

- Identify upsell and retention opportunities



## Requirements



**Must-Have**

- 1–2+ years of experience in e-commerce or DTC customer service

- Proficiency with Gorgias (ticket management, macros, automations)

- Familiarity with Shopify (order management, refunds, customer portal)

- Excellent written communication: empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented

- Self-starter who can handle a high volume of tickets independently



**Nice-to-Have**

- Knowledge of the dietary supplement or wellness industry

- Affinity for direct response marketing and customer retention

- Experience managing subscriptions (Recharge, Skio, or similar)



## What We Offer



- Flexible hours

- Entrepreneurial, fast-paced, and high-growth environment

- Autonomy and real ownership from day one

- Growth opportunities (team lead, CX manager)



## How to Apply



Send us a short message explaining why this role interests you, along with your resume. Bonus: show us an example of a customer response you consider outstanding.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Video Editor for YouTube Channel
description:
Video Editor for YouTube Compilation Channel (Full-Time Remote)



We run a growing YouTube channel producing compilation-style videos. We're looking for a full-time video editor to handle 3-4 videos per week to start, scaling to 4-5 once you're comfortable with the workflow.



How it works: You'll receive a pre-assembled draft project file in Premiere Pro. The draft already has clips placed on the timeline with transitions, blur backgrounds, voiceover, and audio ducking. Your job is to take it from draft to final — pacing, trimming, audio cleanup, sound effects, and making sure the video feels polished and engaging for viewers.



What you'll be doing:

- Receive draft Premiere Pro project files (clips, transitions, and voiceover already placed)

- Adjust pacing — trim clips that are too long, remove dead 
nts, control the flow

- Fix audio — normalize levels, add SFX on transitions, ensure voiceover sits cleanly over clip audio

- Quality control — remove or replace clips with bad quality that slipped through

- Add finishing touches — fade in/out polish, overall feel

- Export and deliver final video files



Requirements:

- Premiere Pro

- Good eye for pacing — you understand what keeps viewers watching

- Reliable internet and ability to handle large project files (500MB-1GB)

- Available for full-time hours (40hr/week)



Nice to have:

- Understanding of YouTube audience retention

- Familiarity with audio ducking and SFX timing



Compensation: $800-1,000/month USD (full-time)



To apply: Send a link to a YouTube video you've edited (or similar work). Tell me how long it took you to edit and what tools you used. Bonus points if you can explain what makes a compilation video's pacing feel right vs wrong.

title: Head of Operations & AI Automation

7. Team & Cross-Functional Leadership

Lead internal tea
mbers and external partners (3PLs, co-packers, developers)

8. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

OTIF (On-Time, In-Full) delivery rate

Production efficiency and cost per unit

9. Qualifications

Strong understanding of operational systems (Shopify, ERP, EDI, CRM, etc.)

Familiarity with automation tools (Make, n8n, APIs) is an asset

title: E-commerce Graphic Designer (Amazon / Shopify Product Listings)
description:
Important: This is a part-time position to start with. However, if your work delivers strong results and improves our product listings, there is a serious opportunity to grow into a full-time role within our company.



We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our growing e-commerce team.



Your main responsibility will be creating high-converting product listing images for platforms like Amazon, 
, and Shopify.



Each product requires a full set of 5 professional images, including lifestyle visuals and infographics that clearly communicate the product’s benefits and features.



A strong focus of this role is the main product image, as it plays a critical role in improving click-through rate (CTR). Based on insights from marketing agencies and data-driven testing, we expect you to design main images that clearly demonstrate what the product does and immediately grab attention within crowded marketplaces.



You will play a key role in increasing both CTR and conversion rate by designing clean, modern, and persuasive visuals similar to top-performing Amazon listings.





Responsibilities:

Design 5 product images per product (main image, infographics, lifestyle images, feature highlights)

Create visually appealing and conversion-focused designs

Use stock/lifestyle images to showcase products in real-life situations

Add clear and engaging text overlays (benefits, features, USPs)

Translate and adapt text when needed using tools like ChatGPT, DeepL, or Google Translate

Follow brand guidelines and maintain consistent visual identity

Optimize images for different platforms (Amazon, 
, Shopify)

Requirements

Proven experience in e-commerce graphic design (Amazon listings preferred)

Strong skills in Photoshop, Canva, or similar tools

Good understanding of what makes product images convert

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Basic English communication skills

Experience with lifestyle compositions and photo editing is a big plus

Nice to Have

Experience with Amazon A+ content

Experience with European marketplaces (
 is a plus)

Understanding of branding and marketing psychology

What We Offer

Long-term position with steady work

Flexible working hours

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling e-commerce brand

Clear instructions and structured workflow





To Apply



Please include:



Your portfolio (especially Amazon-style product listings)

Your favorite project and why

Your rate (per hour or per image set)

The word "DESIGNPRO" in your application so we know you read everything



Additional Note



We encourage the smart and effective use of AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, Canva AI, Photoshop AI, or similar) to improve both the quality and efficiency of your work.



If you are able to leverage tools and workflows that help you produce better results in less time, we highly value that mindset. We are always open to optimizing processes and working with people who think proactively about improving output.
