title: Telemarketing for Medical Practice
description:
About This Job:

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations. We are looking for an energetic, articulate, and highly driven telemarketer who can represent our company to current and potential clients and referral partners. This role blends high volume outbound calling, virtual community outreach, and service promotion, all done from a remote environment.



This position is an excellent opportunity for candidates with experience in BPO, outbound calling, sales, appointment setting, practice liaison/healthcare B2B engagement, or executive recruitment who are looking to advance their career in a meaningful and mission driven environment. We are seeking individuals with excellent English communication skills with a clear, professional, and confident speaking voice, who can represent our practice with warmth and credibility. A Bachelor’s degree in Communications or a related field is preferred and will help you excel in this role.



Healthcare experience is a plus, but not required. We invest in our team by providing comprehensive training, ongoing support, and the tools needed to succeed. If you are proactive, motivated, and passionate about educating and connecting with people, this role offers a rewarding opportunity to grow professionally while making a positive impact on our patients and community referral partners.



Key Responsibilities:

- Promote the company’s services to prospective and established clients.

- Develop relationships to promote our services to referral sources.

- Engage and qualify prospects through insightful, sales-focused conversations.

- Maintain strong relationships with organizations, schools, healthcare providers, and other established referral sources.

- Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of sales activities and make recommendations for improvement.

- Act as a liaison between the practice and the community by being a practice service line knowledge bearer.

- Maintain practice CRM, tracking contacts and incoming referral activity.

- Collaborate with our Management Team to ensure consistent messaging and branding in outbound sales efforts.



Salary and Work Setup:

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below.



1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly

2. Commission-Based: No

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time)



Benefits Package:

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes:



1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC)

2. 13th Month Pay

3. HMO Coverage

4. Ten days of vacation per year

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year

6. Philippine holidays observed



Include the following 2 items in your application to be considered for interview: An up-to-date CV, and a link to your sample voice recording. Your recording should be in your natural speaking voice and be at least 30 seconds in length. We require our staff to have an upbeat, positive, clear communication style and to have the ability to work closely and respectfully with a culturally diverse team.

title: Medical Billing, Claims Processing and Collection Specialist
description:
About This Job: 

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations.   



We’re looking for a detail oriented and solutions focused Medical Billing, Claims Processing, and Collections Specialist to join our growing remote support team. You will play a pivotal role in keeping the practice financial operations running smoothly, ensuring accurate billing, timely claims resolution, and compassionate support that enhances the experience of every patient and provider we serve.  



 Roles & Responsibilities   



1. Medical Billing & Claims Processing:   



- Accurately code and submit claims for all practice clinicians, ensuring proper use of CPT, ICD10, and other required coding standards.  

- Audit provider documentation for each patient encounter to verify that the clinical documentation fully supports the CPT code(s) billed, ensuring compliance with payer requirements and minimizing risk of denials or recoupments.  

- Conduct timely insurance eligibility and benefits verification to help patients understand financial responsibility before or after services.  

- Review, track, and follow up on claim denials, rejections, and delayed claims; submit appeals as needed to ensure timely reimbursement  

- Monitor unresponsive or pending claims, proactively resolving issues to minimize aging accounts and improve revenue cycle efficiency.  

- Manage insurance credentialing and enrollment for new providers, ensuring all required documents and payer applications are completed, submitted, and tracked.  

- Support continuous improvement of billing processes, identifying patterns, inefficiencies, or training needs.  



2. Accounting & Collections:   



- Provide compassionate, high quality customer support via
, chat, and phone—helping patients navigate billing questions with clarity and empathy.  

- Support patients in resolving outstanding balances, offering guidance on payment plans, statements, or insurance explanations of benefits (EOBs)

- Generate and issue billing statements and invoices, ensuring accuracy and clarity for patients and internal stakeholders.  

- Document all communication thoroughly and accurately, maintaining clear records that support smooth follow up and audit readiness.  

- Collaborate closely with our established remote support team, participating in shared workflows, tea
etings, and process improvements.  

- Assist with routine accounting tasks related to patient billing and collections, helping ensure financial operations run smoothly and transparently.  



Qualifications:  



- Demonstrated experience in medical billing and claims management is required, with strong preference for candidates familiar with mental health billing, payer rules, and common denial workflows.

- Experience in healthcare customer service or patient financial support is highly valued, especially in roles requiring empathy, professionalism, and clarity.  

- Background in accounting, collections, or bookkeeping is a strong plus, particularly experience with patient balance resolution and payment workflows.  

- Exceptional English communication skills, with the ability to convey information clearly, positively, and professionally across
, chat, and phone interactions.  

- Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to work respectfully and effectively with a culturally diverse team of clinicians, staff, and patients.  

- High level of attention to detail, with a commitment to accuracy, compliance, and completeness in all billing and documentation tasks.  

- Proactive problem solving mindset, able to navigate complex billing or insurance issues with persistence and initiative.  



Salary and Work Setup: 

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below. 

 

1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly 

2. Commission-Based: No 

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month 

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time) 

 

Benefits Package: 

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes: 

 

1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC) 

2. 13th Month Pay 

3. HMO Coverage 

4. Ten days of vacation per year 

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year 

6. Philippine holidays observed 

 

Requirements:



To be considered for an interview, include the following in your application:  

- Up-to-date CV   

- Sample voice recording (at least 30 seconds in your natural speaking voice).

title: GTM Campaign Engineer
description:
Location: Remote (PH-based preferred)

Type: Full-time

Salary: $1,200/month

About us

We are an AI-powered lead generation and outreach service. We build and run cold outbound campaigns for B2B companies, primarily recruitment and staffing agencies. We handle everything from lead sourcing to messaging to campaign execution. The systems are built, the clients are signed, and we need someone to operate the machine.

The role

You will be the person who takes approved campaign configurations and makes them real. That means building Clay tables, setting up campaigns in HeyReach and Instantly, loading sequences, managing LinkedIn automation, monitoring deliverability, and making sure every campaign runs smoothly across multiple clients simultaneously.

You are not doing strategy. You are not doing sales. You are executing campaigns that have already been planned and approved, following documented SOPs. You will manage 5-10+ campaigns across multiple clients at any given time.

What you will do



Build and manage Clay tables for lead enrichment, filtering, and data cleanup

Set up and monitor
 campaigns in Instantly and Salesforge

Set up and monitor LinkedIn automation campaigns in HeyReach

Load approved messaging sequences into the correct tools with the correct configurations

Follow SOPs precisely for each sourcing module (Sales Navigator scraping, Bright Data job scraping, CSV imports, webhook integrations, deep research workflows)

Monitor campaign performance daily (deliverability, reply rates, bounce rates)

Flag issues before they become problems (domain health, sequence errors, data quality)

Manage DNC lists and ensure contacts are properly excluded

Route replies to the correct client contacts based on campaign identity

Handle the CC handoff process for referral campaigns

Run Supabase dedup checks before launching campaigns

Maintain clean records of what is running, for which client, and the status of each campaign



What you need



Experience with Clay (building tables, using integrations, enrichment workflows, AI columns). This is non-negotiable. If you have not used Clay before, do not apply.

Experience with at least one cold
 sequencer (Instantly, Smartlead, Salesforge, or similar)

Experience with LinkedIn automation tools (HeyReach, Expandi, Dripify, or similar)

Understanding of cold
 deliverability (domain warming, inbox rotation, SPF/DKIM/DMARC, bounce management)

Comfort working with AI tools and prompts (you will use AI-generated content and need to QA it, not just copy-paste blindly)

Strong attention to detail. You are managing multiple campaigns across multiple clients. One wrong sequence loaded into the wrong campaign means a client's prospects get the wrong message. This cannot happen.

Ability to follow SOPs exactly as written while flagging when something does not make sense

Basic understanding of webhooks, CSV data handling, and how tools connect to each other

Reliable internet and availability during US business hours (you will overlap with US-based clients)



Nice to have



Experience with n8n, Make, or Zapier for workflow automation

Experience with Supabase or any database tool

Experience with Bright Data or web scraping tools

Experience with Sales Navigator

Familiarity with the recruitment/staffing industry

Experience managing campaigns for an agency (multiple clients simultaneously)



How you will be evaluated



Can you set up a Clay table from a documented SOP without hand-holding?

Can you manage 5+ campaigns across 3+ clients without dropping balls?

Do you catch errors before they go live?

Do you flag issues proactively or wait until something breaks?

Can you context-switch between clients without mixing up configurations?



To apply

Send a short message (not a cover letter, just a few sentences) answering:



Which cold
 and LinkedIn tools have you used, and for how long?

What is your experience with Clay specifically? Describe a table or workflow you built.

How many simultaneous campaigns have you managed at once across different clients?

What timezone are you in and what hours can you work?



Include a link to your LinkedIn profile. No generic applications. If your message could apply to any job posting, it will be ignored.

title: Backend Developer (Next.js / PostgreSQL / Prisma)
description:
About Us



We are The Dog House Pet Salon, a Houston-based pet services company with 3 grooming locations and a growing pet technology platform called My Pet Credentials (MPC). MPC is a pet identification and records platform that gives every pet a unique ID, stores vaccination records, manages lost-and-found alerts, and connects pet owners with groomers and veterinarians. We are building the infrastructure that makes pet care smarter, safer, and more connected.



Our small, tight-knit team operates like a family. We move fast, solve real problems, and take ownership of our work. We use AI tools heavily in our development workflow -- Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, and other AI assistants are part of how we build every day.



What You Will Do



- Build and maintain REST API endpoints using Next.js API routes

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL database schemas using Prisma ORM

- Implement file upload flows with Amazon S3 (pet photos, documents, vaccination cards)

- Integrate
 services for transactional notifications (registration confirmations, lost pet alerts, appointment reminders)

- Work with AI coding assistants to write, debug, and improve code -- and know when the AI is wrong

- Collaborate with our frontend and mobile developers to deliver features end-to-end

- Write clean, well-structured code that other developers can understand and maintain

- Handle authentication, authorization, and API security best practices



Skills Required



- Strong experience with Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript

- Working knowledge of Next.js (especially API routes / server-side features)

- Experience with PostgreSQL or similar relational databases

- Familiarity with an ORM (Prisma preferred, Sequelize or TypeORM also acceptable)

- Experience with REST API design and implementation

- Comfortable with file uploads and cloud storage (S3 or similar)

- Experience using AI coding tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, Cursor, or similar)

- Ability to review AI-generated code critically -- catch bugs, security issues, and poor patterns

- Basic understanding of
 integration (SMTP, transactional
 services)

- Git and GitHub for version control



Nice to Have



- Experience with Stripe payment integration

- Firebase push notifications

- Redis caching

- Rate limiting and API security hardening

- Experience working on pet, health, or SaaS platforms



Why Join Us



- Long-term position with a growing company -- this is not a short-term gig

- Work on a product that genuinely helps pets and their owners

- Use cutting-edge AI development tools daily -- you will sharpen skills that are in high demand

- Competitive pay with potential for raises based on performance

- Direct impact -- your code ships to real users, not a shelf

- Small tea
ans you have real ownership and your voice matters



How to Apply



Send your application with:

1. A brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

2. Links to your GitHub profile or code samples

3. One example of a project where you built or contributed to a REST API

4. Your experience level with AI coding tools (which ones, how you use them)



Qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short online skills assessment (approximately 75 minutes, open-book, AI tools allowed). The assessment tests real-world scenarios you would encounter in this role -- not trick questions or whiteboard puzzles.



Work Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours per week. We are flexible on exact hours but expect overlap with US Central Time (Houston, TX) for team communication.



Payment: Paid bi-weekly or monthly via your preferred method (Wise, PayPal, direct bank transfer).



Equipment: You provide your own computer and internet connection. We provide access to all necessary software, accounts, and AI tool subscriptions.



We use AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Cursor) as a standard part of our workflow. We are looking for people who know how to use AI effectively and know when it is wrong.

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:







Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: TikTok KOL Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and highly motivated KOL Manager to oversee and grow our TikTok influencer marketing efforts in Philippines. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and managing relationships with TikTok influencers to drive brand awareness, engagement, and ultimately sales in the local market.

Key Responsibilities:

1. KOL Strategy Development:

  - Develop and implement a comprehensive TikTok KOL influencer strategy aligned with brand objectives, market trends, and consumer insights in Vietnam.

  - Create campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and conversion, with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes.

2. KOL Research and Identification:

  - Identify and establish relationships with top-tier and micro-influencers in Vietnam who align with the brand’s values, target audience, and goals.

  - Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends and emerging influencers to ensure the brand is always at the forefront of the platform.

3. Campaign Execution & Management:

  - Oversee end-to-end influencer campaign execution, from briefing and content creation to final delivery and performance analysis.

  - Ensure influencers’ content aligns with brand guidelines, voice, and overall marketing strategy.

4. Collaboration and Negotiation:

  - Negotiate contracts, terms, and compensation with influencers and influencer agencies to ensure mutually beneficial partnerships.

  - Collaborate with internal teams (creative, PR, and marketing) to ensure influencer content is integrated seamlessly into the overall marketing strategy.

5. Performance Tracking and Reporting:

  - Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns on TikTok, track key metrics (engagement, reach, conversions), and optimize strategies accordingly.

  - Provide regular reports and insights to management on campaign effectiveness, ROI, and influencer impact.

6. Community Building:

  - Build and nurture long-term relationships with influencers to foster loyalty and repeat collaborations.

  - Engage in community management by interacting with influencers’ audiences and ensuring positive brand sentiment.

7. Market and Competitor Insights:

  - Monitor competitors' influencer strategies on TikTok and analyze trends in influencer marketing within Philippine’s digital landscape.

  - Use data and insights to continuously improve and adapt the influencer strategy.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL management, ideally in the TikTok ecosystem, preferably within Philippines.

- Strong understanding of TikTok trends, features, and best practices.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills.

- Creative mindset with an ability to think outside the box to create viral content.

- Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred:

- Experience working with a brand in the lifestyle, fashion, or e-commerce industry.

- Existing network of TikTok influencers in Philippines.

This is a serious outbound SALES role, not call center work and not general VA work.

We are a U.S.-based real estate investment firm hiring full-time cold callers to generate motivated seller leads.



This role is NOT for:



– Call center reps

– Customer service agents

– Part-time callers

– Appointment setters

– Freelancers juggling multiple clients



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:



– Full-time outbound cold calling experience (real estate is a plus, not required)

– Confident, persuasive, and professional phone skills

– Experience working with multi-line dialer systems and CRM platforms to track leads, notes, and follow-ups

– Strong work ethic and resilience

– Coachable mindset and long-term commitment



REQUIREMENTS:



– Fluent English (accent OK, must be very clear)

– Quiet professional workspace

– High-quality headset + stable internet

– Full-time availability (Mon–Fri, 40 hrs/week, EST)



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:



– High-volume outbound cold calling to property owners

– Follow proven scripts and objection handling

– Qualify motivated sellers

– Enter accurate notes, tags, and follow-ups into CRM

– Send SMS follow-ups to cold or unresponsive leads



WHY JOIN US:



– Work directly with U.S. real estate investors (30+ years experience)

– Long-term stable role

– Performance-based income growth

– No micromanaging — we care about results

– Growth path into Lead Manager / Senior Acquisition roles



HOW TO APPLY:



Only apply if cold calling is your MAIN professional skill.



Apply here:




/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:


/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy



Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

About Us



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate investment company focused exclusively on acquiring and expanding our portfolio of investment properties.



Our main goal is to connect with property owners and sellers who have off-market properties for sale.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily)

 and

? Search for and engage with posts from people selling their property.

? Maintain and post updates to our own company social media pages 
, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok).

Why You’ll Love Working With Us:

title: AI Automation Virtual Assistant (White Label Resalable Solutions)
description:
AI Automation Virtual Assistant (White Label Resalable Solutions)

We’re seeking a highly skilled AI Automation Virtual Assistant who specializes in building resalable, white label automation solutions using Zapier, 
, and GoHighLevel (GHL). This role requires hands on experience creating real automation systems—not just theoretical knowledge—and the ability to provide examples of past workflow builds, templates, or automation assets.

You will be responsible for designing scalable automations, developing reusable templates, and setting up end to end systems that can be packaged and resold to clients.

Key Responsibilities

AI Automation & Workflow Development

•	Build reusable and white label automation templates using Zapier, 
, or GHL

•	Create end to end workflow automations for lead management, client onboarding, notifications, CRM tasks, and business operations

•	Develop AI assisted workflows combining LLMs, APIs, and CRM actions

•	Build custom automation systems for data capture, lead routing, task creation, user segmentation, and reporting

•	Optimize and refine existing automations for reliability, speed, and scale

•	Document workflow structure so templates can be resold and used by multiple clients

Chatbot & AI System Creation

•	Build reusable chatbot flows for GHL

•	Set up AI powered assistants for customer support, lead qualification, onboarding, and FAQs

•	Create white label chatbot templates that agencies can resell

•	Integrate chatbot actions with Zapier, 
, or GHL automations

Integration & System Setup

•	Connect CRMs, forms, landing pages, booking tools, and databases using automation platforms

•	Create standardized integrations clients can plug into (e.g., CRM setup packs, onboarding systems, lead nurture flows)

•	Build API based automations where no native integration exists

•	Maintain clean, well documented workflows ready for duplication and resale

Required Skills & Experience

•	Proven experience building automations in Zapier, 
, or GHL

•	Ability to provide screenshots, workflow maps, or examples of past automation work

•	Experience creating white label or resalable automation templates

•	Strong understanding of automation logic, triggers, branching, and error handling

•	Ability to turn business processes into streamlined, automated systems

•	Strong documentation and communication skills

Nice to Have

•	Experience with chatbot builders

•	Familiarity with AI content or AI agent tools

•	Ability to create simple process diagrams or SOPs

•	Basic design skills for template presentation (optional)

To Apply

Please include examples of your automation work, such as:

•	Screenshots of Zapier, Make, or GHL workflows

•	Reusable templates you've built

•	Examples of white label or resalable automations

•	Workflow maps, documentation, or links to past projects

title: Controller
description:
Introduction:

We are a fast growing e-commerce business. We have a strong fan base and customer base. We provide top quality products and top tier customer service. As our controller, your role is a hybrid between accounting, building systems/SOPs and operations. 



Responsibilities:

Invoicing wholesalers, tracking payments

Updating wholesalers sheet, modified orders sheet

Booking expenses and receipt management

Tracking revenue and COGS by product

Monthly close and reconciliations

Generating and reviewing financial reports

Building a treasury system



Operating tasks:

Inventory tracking

Ad hoc operational tasks



Requirements:



CPA required. In-depth understanding and experience (1-3 years) with Shopify, QuickBooks, Google Drive, Google Sheet



Excellent English communication. C2 Mastery required. 



The requirement for English is very high for this role, you need to be very fluent in English



You will be on a screenshare with the team for your shift every time. You will be coming to the “office” to work virtually



The shift is from 9:30pm - 5:30am local Philippines time. It is required that you are already on this night shift schedule for at least 6 months with a previous employer



How To Apply:



For the subject line of your application, please do the following steps:

Go to our
 page 
 and find our website. Visit the website and find the t-shirt for sale which has a picture of Alex Pagulayan on it. The words written on the t-shirt + the word Bookkeeper will be your ‘subject line’ to write.



Attach your Portfolio



Answer these to questions:

Are you ok with being on a screenshare during your entire shift every time?

How long did you work on this night shift schedule previously? What was the schedule?



Create a one-minute video on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Upload it to Google Drive and provide the link

title: Ecommerce Virtual Assistant – Shopify & Amazon Affiliate
description:
Ecommerce Virtual Assistant – Shopify & Amazon Affiliate

We are seeking a detail oriented and experienced Ecommerce Virtual Assistant to support our Shopify store and Amazon Affiliate operations. This role is ideal for someone with hands on experience managing ecommerce tasks, optimising product listings, supporting affiliate content creation, and improving day to day store workflows.

You will play an important role in enhancing efficiency across ecommerce operations, product management, content workflows, and customer experience.

Key Responsibilities

Shopify Store Support

• Manage and update Shopify product listings, descriptions, pricing, images, and collections

• Maintain store assets, including banners, product pages, and collection layouts

• Assist with store organisation, SEO updates, and product categorisation

• Support improvements to store navigation and the overall customer journey

• Monitor store performance and recommend enhancements to increase conversions

Amazon Affiliate Support

• Conduct product research to identify high converting affiliate items

• Generate and manage Amazon Affiliate links

• Assist with content placement for blogs, reviews, and promotional posts

• Track affiliate performance and identify opportunities for improved engagement or conversions

Social Media & Content Tasks

• Support the scheduling and posting of content across TikTok, Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

• Repurpose Shopify and Amazon Affiliate content for use across social media platforms

• Assist with creating basic content outlines, captions, and product focused highlights

• Monitor engagement and help manage audience interactions as needed

Required Skills & Experience

• Proven experience managing Shopify stores

• Experience with Amazon Affiliate programs and product linking

• Strong attention to detail in managing product data

• Familiarity with ecommerce tasks such as listing optimisation, keyword usage, and content updates

• Understanding of social media workflows and scheduling (TikTok, LinkedIn,
, Instagram, Reels)

• Strong communication and documentation skills

Nice to Have

• Canva or basic design skills

• Experience with ecommerce analytics tools

• Knowledge of SEO or product research tools

To Apply

Please include examples of your previous ecommerce work, such as:

• Shopify product listings or store improvements you’ve managed

• Amazon Affiliate links or content you’ve created

• Store related workflows or content samples

• Any visuals, documentation, or portfolio examples relevant to ecommerce

title: UI/UX & Graphic Designer - Figma
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring a creative designer who is strong in both UI/UX and visual design for the web. This role suits someone who cares about clean layouts, branding consistency, and conversion focused design. You will work closely with developers and marketers to turn ideas into polished digital experiences.



What You’ll Do



Design modern website layouts, landing pages, and UI components



Create graphics for web, social, and marketing use

title: Lead Reactivation Specialist
description:
Lead Reactivation Specialist

Part-Time Virtual Assistant | Remote (Philippines)

Warm Calling | Lead Follow-Up | CRM Management





About the Company

We are a boutique real estate agency based in Canberra (ACT), Australia, managing a portfolio of 300+ rental properties alongside an active property sales operation. We’ve been operating for several years and have built up a substantial database of past clients, former landlords, previous sales leads, and warm contacts.

We’re now looking for someone to unlock the value sitting in that database.

The Opportunity

We have a large database of contacts who have all had a previous touchpoint with our agency — these are not stone-cold leads. They include:

Former property management clients (landlords who were previously under our management)

Lapsed property management leads (landlords who enquired but didn’t sign up)

Past sales leads (buyers and sellers we’ve previously engaged with)

Former sales clients (owners who purchased or sold through us and may be ready to transact again)

Every contact in this database has an existing relationship with our agency. Your job is to re-engage them, have genuine conversations, identify opportunities, and book appointments for our team.

The Role

As our Lead Reactivation Specialist, you will work through our database systematically, making outbound calls and sending follow-up
s to re-engage past clients and warm leads. All activity is logged and tracked through our CRM.

Day-to-Day Responsibilities

Make outbound calls to past property management clients and former sales leads across our database

Identify landlords who may be looking to switch agencies, re-list their property for management, or sell

Identify past sales contacts who may be ready to buy, sell, or invest again

Follow up with lapsed contacts via phone and
 to re-establish the relationship

Qualify leads and book appointments for our property management and sales teams

Log all call outcomes, notes, and follow-up actions in the CRM after every contact

Maintain accurate, up-to-date records so no lead falls through the cracks

Provide regular reporting on call volume, contact outcomes, and conversions

Compensation

Base rate: AUD $10/hour

On top of the hourly rate, you earn performance bonuses for every lead you convert:

Conversion Type

Bonus (AUD)

Property signed to a management agreement

$100

Property listing signed and sold

$500



The more you convert, the more you earn. These bonuses are paid on top of your hourly rate and there is no cap on the number of bonuses you can earn.

Essential Skills & Experience

Excellent English speaking and comprehension — this is non-negotiable. You will be calling Australian property owners and having real conversations, not reading scripts. Your spoken English must be clear, confident, and natural.

Real estate industry experience — you must understand how property management and property sales work. Experience in acquisitions, settlements, leasing, or sales support is ideal.

Proven outbound calling experience — cold calling, warm calling, lead follow-up, or customer reactivation. We need someone comfortable picking up the phone.

CRM proficiency — all calls and outcomes must be logged in our CRM. You need to be disciplined about recording every interaction, not just the wins.

Professional phone manner — warm, friendly, and consultative. These are people who already know our agency, so the tone needs to be relationship-driven, not salesy.

Ability to work AEST-aligned hours (Australian Eastern Standard Time) — you need to be calling during Australian business hours.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment for calls.

Desirable (Not Essential)

Experience working with Australian clients or businesses

Experience with Australian property CRM platforms (Agentbox, Rex, PropertyMe, or similar)

Familiarity with Australian real estate terminology (management agreement, exclusive agency, settlement, strata)

Team leadership or call centre supervisory experience

 marketing or follow-up sequence experience

What We Offer

AUD $10/hour base rate paid via Wise (international transfer)

Uncapped performance bonuses — $100 per management sign-up, $500 per property sold

Part-time hours to start, with the opportunity to expand based on results

Direct reporting line to the Managing Director — no layers of middle management

A warm database of contacts who already know our agency — you’re not starting from scratch

A supportive team that values initiative, clear communication, and results





How to Apply

Please submit the following:

Your CV/resume highlighting relevant real estate and calling experience

A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself in English — tell us about your real estate experience and why this role interests you. This can be a simple phone recording or voice memo. This is the single most important part of your application.

A brief note outlining what CRM platforms you have used and your experience with them

Any relevant portfolio work or references from previous real estate roles

Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

We’re hiring for spoken English ability as much as experience. The voice recording lets us hear how you communicate — it doesn’t need to be perfect, it needs to be natural and clear.

title: *Female* Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)
description:
Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)



Salary: 1,500 USD / month realistic ($500 base + 1,000 performance + bonuses)

Work Hours: Night shift PH time, 5 days/week (including weekends)



About the Role

BeautyGrow helps US med spas fill their calendars with lip filler, facial balancing, and Botox appointments.



We run the ads. Leads come to us.

Your job: turn those warm leads into booked appointments by calling and texting fast, every day, following our proven system. We obsess over speed, because calling leads in under 60 seconds massively increases shows and sales. 







This is full?time, long?term, and performance?driven.



What You’ll Do (Daily)

You will live in two modes: HUNTING and CLOSING.



HUNTING (whenever you are not on a live call):



Call all new leads within 60 seconds of them opting in, unless you are currently on a call. 



,

Work all our client accounts in this exact order:

New leads

Callbacks

Warm replies (people asking to book or pay)

Smart?list follow?ups (older warm leads)



Use GoHighLevel (GHL) and Slack so no lead is left untouched during your shift.



CLOSING (when you are talking to a lead):



Follow our C.L.O.S.E.R. script word?for?word, but naturally.

Ask about their goals, clarify their problems, explain the treatment simply, and book them into a time that works.

Handle basic concerns on price / fear / timing and then lock in their appointment so they actually show.



You will be setting for multiple med spa clients, not just one.



What Success Looks Like

You are considered a strong setter here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 



Your queues (new, callbacks, warm, follow?ups) are cleared every shift.



You hit and beat your daily booking targets and help drive high show rates. 





Your notes are clear, your tone is professional, and clients compliment your responsiveness.

Compensation

Monthly performance bonuses may be up to +$500 USD (on top of $1500 salary)

Uncapped +5 bonus USD for every low?ticket booking

Realistic total for solid performers: around 1,500 USD+ per month

We reward consistent execution, not politics.



Requirements (Non?Negotiable)



You are based in the Philippines and comfortable working US EST night shifts (including weekends).

Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.



Stable home setup:

At least 100 Mbps up and down internet.

No frequent power outages, or you have a reliable backup solution.

Good headset and quiet work environment.



You are hungry to get very good at sales / appointment setting, not just “have a job.”

Experience in call centers / outbound sales / appointment setting is a plus, but we will train the right person who has the work ethic and coachability.



Culture & Training

We joke a lot, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is:



Be the best.

Have fun doing it.

You get:



A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook explaining exactly how to win here.

Script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews so you “breathe the script,” not just read it.



Clear KPIs and coaching so your skills and income grow over time.

We like people who show up every day, do the boring work, take feedback, and raise the bar for the whole team.



—--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**HOW TO APPLY**



Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: Auto Body Parts Sourcing & Collision Repair Coordinator (Remote - Night Shift)
description:
?TYPE OF WORK: Full Time (40 hours/week)

WAGE / SALARY: $2.00 - $2.50 USD per hour

SCHEDULE: Strictly 6:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

?About Us:

We operate a high-volume auto body and collision repair shop based in Canada. We rely on smart systems, quick communication, and a highly organized remote team to keep our shop floor moving without delays. If you know your way around collision parts, love hunting for the best deals, and can coordinate smoothly with a live shop floor, we want you on our team.

?The Role:

We are looking for an Auto Body Parts Sourcing & Repair Coordinator to act as the digital bridge between our estimators, our parts vendors, and our shop floor. You will be responsible for sourcing OEM, Aftermarket, and used collision parts, gathering quotes, and organizing repair schedules. You must have genuine knowledge of auto body anatomy—this is not a generic admin role.

?Key Responsibilities:

?Collision Parts Sourcing & Quoting: Use
 to request and organize quotes from official parts vendors for OEM and Aftermarket parts (bumpers, fenders, hoods, lighting, etc.).

?Used Parts Hunting: Aggressively search platforms like
 Marketplace, Kijiji, and eBay to find the best quality and cheapest used/recycled auto body parts to maximize our repair margins.

?Software Navigation: Use the Mitchell estimating system to look up specific collision parts, check repair times, and review technical repair procedures.

?Shop Coordination: Arrange and schedule cars for repair. You will use WhatsApp, internet phone (VoIP), and text/SMS to call into the shop and coordinate directly with the estimators and technicians on the floor.

?Administrative Management: Keep all parts orders, delivery ETAs, and repair schedules highly organized using Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive).

?Requirements:

?Auto Body Knowledge (Mandatory): You must know collision parts. You need to know the difference between a fender and a quarter panel, a radiator and a condenser, and understand basic collision terminology without having to Google it every time.

?Platform Experience: Familiarity with automotive estimating/repair software like Mitchell (Mitchell Cloud Estimating / Mitchell Connect) is required.

?Sourcing Savvy: You must know how to navigate online marketplaces (eBay, FB Marketplace, Kijiji) to find specific, compatible used auto body parts.

?Communication Skills: Excellent written and spoken English. You will be calling the shop, texting updates, and
ing vendors daily.

?Schedule Match: You must be available to work strictly from 6:00 PM to 2:00 AM PHT to align with our Canadian shop hours.

?Tech Setup: You must have a quiet workspace, a fast computer, a reliable internet connection, and a noise-canceling headset for clear VoIP calls.

title: AI Engineer
description:
AI Engineer – Autonomous Business Platform



Location:** Remote / Online From Home

Type: Full-Time



---



## **About Us**



We are building the next-generation AI platform that empowers entrepreneurs to launch, operate, and scale businesses almost entirely autonomously. Think Polsia AI meets AWS for entrepreneurship: AI agents handle everything from marketing, lead generation, cold outreach, campaigns, content creation, sales calls, client onboarding, and operations — all orchestrated seamlessly in a multi-agent ecosystem.



Our mission is to reduce the gap between having a business idea and running a fully operational company to **hours, not months**, while delivering measurable results for clients.



---



## **Role Overview**



We are seeking an experienced **AI Engineer** to architect, develop, and optimize our multi-agent autonomous platform. You will work across AI, automation, and workflow orchestration to bring our vision of a fully autonomous business-as-a-service platform to life.



You will help design AI agents that handle complex tasks, from prospecting to sales calls, campaign execution, reporting, and scaling — across industries. You will also implement memory systems, knowledge sharing, and learning loops to ensure continuous improvement of AI-driven workflows.



---



## **Key Responsibilities**



* Design, implement, and maintain **multi-agent AI workflows** that automate full business operations.

* Build AI agents for **lead generation, cold
 outreach, multi-channel campaigns, AI voice/video calls, client onboarding, reporting, and campaign optimization**.

* Integrate AI with **external APIs and services** (Webflow, WordPress, HubSpot, Calendly, Google Workspace, Twilio, Zapier, Stripe, QuickBooks, social media platforms, etc.).

* Develop a **centralized AI knowledge base** and memory system to maintain consistency and personalization across agents and clients.

* Implement **hyper-personalized, multi-channel acquisition strategies**, allowing AI to adapt based on lead engagement and client results.

* Ensure AI agents maintain **legal and compliance standards** (GDPR, CAN-SPAM, DNC).

* Optimize workflows to **scale across industries**, enabling rapid onboarding of new clients with minimal human intervention.

* Create **learning loops** for AI agents to improve scripts, content, campaigns, and outreach strategies continuously.

* Collaborate with frontend, backend, and product teams to provide a **seamless UX for entrepreneurs**, enabling dashboard management, reporting, and strategy oversight.

* Monitor AI performance, identify bottlenecks, and propose new automation strategies to **increase efficiency and impact**.



---



## **Required Skills & Experience**



* 3+ years of experience in **AI/ML engineering**, NLP, or conversational AI.

* Strong experience with **OpenAI GPT, Claude, or similar large language models**.

* Experience with **multi-agent systems** (AutoGPT, LangChain, custom orchestrations).

* Proficiency in Python, Node.js, or similar for **API integration and workflow automation**.

* Experience with **vector databases** (Pinecone, Weaviate) and memory systems for AI knowledge sharing.

* Understanding of **CRM systems, marketing automation, campaign management**, and lead generation workflows.

* Experience building **autonomous AI agents** that interact with external services and perform real-time decision-making.

* Strong understanding of *
 deliverability, domain reputation management, and multi-channel marketing compliance**.

* Familiarity with **cloud infrastructure, scaling AI services, and serverless architectures**.

* Excellent problem-solving skills, self-motivation, and ability to thrive in a fast-paced startup environment.



---



## **Preferred Skills**



* Experience with **TTS/STT technologies** (ElevenLabs, Whisper) and AI video avatars (Synthesia, DID).

* Experience designing AI for **B2B and B2C workflows**.

* Knowledge of **Zapier, n8n, or similar automation platforms** for integrating AI workflows.

* Experience with **data visualization and reporting tools** (Looker Studio, Tableau, Google Data Studio).



---



## **What You’ll Build**



* AI agents that fully automate **marketing, sales, content, operations, and client success**.

* Multi-agent orchestration system that allows **scaling across clients and industries**.

* Autonomous workflow for **lead scoring, personalized outreach, AI-driven calls, and conversion tracking**.

* Knowledge-sharing system to allow agents to **learn from each other and from client data**.

* Dashboard and reporting framework for entrepreneurs to **monitor and control their business at a glance**.



---



## **Why Join Us**



* Work on **cutting-edge AI technology** that could redefine entrepreneurship.

* Build a platform capable of scaling to **hundreds of thousands of clients worldwide**.

* Opportunity to shape the future of autonomous businesses.

* Competitive salary and the ability to work fully remote.

* Be part of a **visionary team building the “AWS for entrepreneurship”**.



---



### **Apply If You**



* Dream about building AI that **runs businesses autonomously**.

* Are excited by **complex multi-agent systems, workflows, and automation**.

title: Virtual Assistants Need
description:
We are an e-commerce company based in California, USA. We've been in business for over ten years and have extensive experience in eCommerce. We're currently looking for a few high-energy, good communicators, punctual, able to follow instructions, analytical, and hard workers.



The ideal candidates must be fluent in English (both spoken and written) and have prior remote working experience. The candidates should be available to work 40 hours per week, have access to a fast and stable internet connection, and own a functioning web camera and microphone for daily video calls. The weekly salary is $200 per week via PayPal.



To skip the interview process and be considered for the position, please upload a video of yourself answering the questions below honestly and in detail, and provide the link. If we believe you’re a good fit for the role, we’ll send you a job offer within a few days.



1. What type of work experience do you have?



2. What is your dream job?



3. What is your favorite movie?



4. Do you think a University/College education is essential?



5. Are you currently employed, and when can you start working?



Thank you for your interest, and see you on the other side.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Media Buyer ( Lead generation)
description:
Dear Media Buyer,

We are looking for a talented and driven media buyer to join our team at a fast-growing lead generation company. Our goal is to generate as many leads as possible through our campaigns.

In this role, you will be responsible for managing our advertising campaigns. Your primary focus will be on analysing our campaigns (advertisements), completing data sheets, and launching and optimising advertisements on platforms such as
 and Instagram, ensuring that our creative expressions – photos and videos – stand out and convert.



As part of our team, you will take ownership of the full advertising process, from crafting strategies to testing and analyzing performance data. You’ll also play a key role in creating high-quality, visually appealing materials that align with our business and speak directly to our target audience.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager. You’re not only creative but also data-driven, with a sharp eye for detail and a passion for turning ideas into successful campaigns.



Should we enter into a long-term collaboration, you will first start by filling in the data sheets to make sure you have mastered that. Then we will move on to the tasks involved.

Please answer the following questions, if you are interested:



- Do you have experience with Ad Copys etc?

- Do you have experience in FB Ads Manager?

- Are you able to work structured, noting down the KPI’s?

- Can you work according to OUR strategy?

- Are you available for 3/4 hours a day, 6/7 days a week? And are you available to work more hours in about a few months?

- Are you familiar with technical ad terms , such as ROAS, CPA, CPC, frequency, etc.



As a Data entry operator you have:



- Good communication skills (Must!)

- Experience with working with workflows, video trainings

- Experience in noting down KPI’s in Google sheets (Must)

- Experience with workflows like Google sheets, Excel etc. (Must)

- Experience with different communication platforms (Slack)

- To ensure you have read this job description thoroughly, please include the word strawberry as the title of your application.

- Lots of experience with META ads manager and preferring in a
 structure (proxy) (MUST!)



If you do not meet the requirements, do NOT apply. (thank you)



* WORKFLOW IS PROVIDED THROUGH EVERY STEP OF THE PROCESS

* CAREER OPPORTUNITIES IN THE TEAM

* VIDEO TRAINING IS PROVIDED AS WELL



If you believe you’re the perfect fit for this role and can bring value to our company, we’d love to hear from you! Please respond to this post and provide details of your experience





Kind regards,



Daan & Teun

title: Creative Strategist ( Facebook)
description:
Hello,

We are a performance-driven marketing team that generates leads at scale for our supplier through Meta Ads 
 & Instagram). For us, it’s all about one thing: results. No vanity metrics, no fluff.

That’s why we’re looking for a Creative Strategist to run and optimize our entire creative engine.

What you’ll be doing

Full responsibility for our ad creatives

Coming up with concepts that directly address pain points and buying behavior

Writing scripts for high-converting video ads

Copywriting for static ads and video (hooks, body, CTAs)

Collaborating with editors/designers (or creating content yourself)

Continuously testing, iterating, and scaling winning creatives

Analyzing data (CTR, CPA, hooks, retention) and driving decisions based on it

Developing new angles, hooks, and formats based on performance

Who you are

You don’t think like a “creative,” but like a marketer who sells

You understand how to grab attention in the first 3 seconds

You know how to translate a product into irresistible messaging

You have experience with Meta Ads (or are willing to master it quickly)

You’re obsessed with performance and numbers

You’re fast, sharp, and take ownership

You have no ego—just a focus on what works

Who you’re NOT

Someone who wants to create “pretty content” without a goal

Someone who needs inspiration to get started

Someone who waits for instructions

What you’ll get

Direct impact on growth and revenue

Working in a team that values results above all else

Plenty of room to test, fail, and succeed

Opportunity to advance as you deliver results

Important

If you can’t demonstrate that your creatives have delivered results (leads, sales, CPA reduction, etc.), then this isn’t for you.

We’re not looking for an artist.

We’re looking for a killer.

Interested?

Send us:

Examples of ads/creatives you’ve created

Results (CTR, CPA, ROAS, etc.)

A brief explanation of your thought process behind those creatives

No portfolio = no response.

Best regards,

Daan & Teun

title: Operations & Sales Manager (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote (U.S. House Cleaning Industry)



Hours: 30 hours per week (Monday – Saturday)



Shifts: 8 AM – 2 PM EST OR 2 PM – 8PM EST



Compensation

Base Pay: $6.00 / hour starting out



Commission: 5% monthly commission on all revenue booked.

Commission: 2% recurring for all revenue booked



The Role

Clean Bro LLC is looking for a high-energy, technically proficient Operations & Sales Manager to handle the day-to-day heartbeat of our residential and commercial cleaning business. We pride ourselves on reliability and professionalism; we need a tea
mber who embodies those same values.



Answering every call within one minute is an absolute requirement. You won’t just be answering phones; you’ll be booking sales, managing our cleaning crews, and ensuring our systems run like a well-oiled machine.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Inquiries: Handle all incoming calls/messages; follow scripts to close sales and book appointments.



Operational Management: Manage cleaner schedules, handle customer requests, and process invoicing.



Systems & CRM: Daily management of GoHighLevel, Jobber (Quo), Google Suite, Thumbtack, and Angi.



Requirements

Experience: Experience in the house cleaning industry is a major plus.



Communication: Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Technical Setup: Must have reliable high-speed internet and a backup power source to ensure 100% uptime.



Traits: You are responsive, timely, and have a "zero-missed-call" mentality.



How to Apply

We are looking to hire ASAP. To be considered, you must:



Record a Video: Create a CUSTOM 1 minute video introduction sharing who you are, your experience, and why you are the best fit for this role.



Submit:
 your video and resume to 



Hiring Process: Video Review -> Group Interview -> Individual Interview(s) -> Job Offer.



Please note: Applications that include a generic or non-custom video will not be considered. Your video must be specific to this role.

title: Own Your Results—Own Your Future
description:
(Cold Call Predator & Elite Closer | Real Base + Uncapped Pay | Full Autonomy & High Accountability)



Own Your Results—Own Your Future



Most companies talk about opportunity; we pay for it—every single month. Our best earners don’t chase quotas—they lap them. If you want a long-term sales seat (not a “gig”), extreme autonomy, and direct advancement based solely on metrics, read on. If not, keep scrolling.



Your Mission



100+ outbound calls per day to distressed property owners (tax defaults, inheritance, liens, etc.—you find the pain, you build rapport, you close)



Zero handoffs: You control the deal from initial outreach through close. No pass-offs, no excuses, no “support” teams to blame



Live in your numbers: You log every lead, every call, every stage—real-time, every day. Pipeline management is not optional.



Transparent scoreboard: Your results are public. You know exactly where you stand. Your pay and growth = your production. Period.



What We Provide



Real base (not a “draw”): You start with a guaranteed income while you stack your pipeline



No cap on commission: The only limit is your output. Top reps consistently double/triple their base—because they outperform



Everything but excuses: We deliver the tech, the data, and the process. You deliver the work ethic and skill



Clear promotion path: Prove yourself on the board, and you’re first in line for leadership roles, new territories, or team buildouts



Long-term security: We retain only top producers—those who meet or exceed daily/weekly metrics, quarter after quarter



Top Performers Are:



Obsessed with their own KPIs—love tracking, reporting, and improving



Comfortable with radical feedback, public rankings, and aggressive targets



Full-cycle closers who want a direct link between their actions and their earnings



Looking for a career seat—not a temp job, not “account management,” and never “just a lead generator”



Do NOT Apply If:



You dislike public, daily performance tracking



You need long ramp periods, constant encouragement, or handholding



You prefer “team closes,” handoffs, or a relaxed, untracked sales process



You don’t want to own the full sales cycle—start to finish



How to Apply – Two Steps Required (No Exceptions):



Resume: Must clearly show outbound calling and end-to-end closing experience. Include your personal best for daily calls & monthly closed deals.



2-Minute Unscripted Voice Memo:



State your name, country, and your record for calls in a single day



Break down your most challenging cold-to-close deal (real steps, negotiation tactics, outcome)



Share your daily tracking system for calls, leads, and pipeline



Explain why you want a career where your commission is tied directly to your scoreboard—not a relationship manager, not “just a job”



Applications missing either step, or not following these instructions, are auto-rejected.



Bottom Line:



This is a real seat for a real producer. Metrics, pay, and advancement are tied to your scoreboard—not your tenure, effort, or personality. Want in? Show us. If you want comfort, look elsewhere.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
Apply Here 



Senior Accountant



Philippines-Based — 100% Work From Home $1,800–$2,800 USD/month based on experience



Agate CPA is hiring a Senior Accountant to work directly with U.S.-based business clients to bring clarity, organization, and insight to their financial operations.



This role is ideal for an experienced accountant who enjoys working with clients, solving real financial problems, and turning messy accounting into clear, reliable financial information. You will manage the accounting work for a portfolio of clients, participate in regular client conversations, and help ensure their financial systems are accurate, organized, and understandable.



This is not a traditional bookkeeping role. It requires strong accounting knowledge, sound judgment, and the ability to communicate clearly with clients about their financial information.



This is a full-time individual contributor role. It does not supervise other tea
mbers.



Compensation & Benefits



Compensation: $1,800–$2,800 USD per month based on experience, 13th month pay, Firm-provided computer, 24 days Paid Time Off annually, accrued at 2 days per month starting the month after your hire date. PTO covers vacation, holidays, and sick leave. Christmas office closure (does not count against PTO).



This is an independent contractor engagement.



Required Experience



Candidates for this role should have the following experience:



8+ years of experience working for a U.S.-based public accounting or U.S.-based outsourced accounting firm, serving multiple business clients simultaneously across a variety of industries. Strong hands-on experience performing full month-end closes. Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online. Experience explaining financial results to business owners or leadership teams. Comfort working directly with clients in a client-facing accounting or advisory role Experience managing accounting for multiple clients simultaneously



Work Location



This position is 100% work from home.



Work from home specifically means work from your home only. It does not mean work from a library, cafe, restaurant, your friend's house, your parent's house, a co-working space, or any other location that is not your home. Working in unauthorized locations puts client data at risk. If you cannot work 100% from home, please refrain from applying to this role.



Requirements include:



Reliable high-speed internet connection. A backup internet connection. A professional, secure home office environment. Ability to maintain confidentiality of client financial information



Core Working Hours



Monday – Friday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippines Time)



This role requires working U.S. daytime hours, which are graveyard hours in the Philippines. Occasional additional hours may be required during busy periods such as month-end close or new client onboarding.



Responsibilities



Accounting Work: Transaction coding and classification. Bank and balance sheet reconciliations. Bill pay and payroll for certain clients. Maintaining organized accounting systems. Resolving routine accounting platform issues. Reviewing financial data for accuracy and completeness. Assisting with onboarding new accounting clients, including cleaning up their accounting and QBO file.



Client Communication: Responding to client questions via
 and client portal. Participating in video meetings with clients (typically monthly). Explaining financial statements clearly and professionally. Maintaining strong client relationships.



Tools and Internal Systems: Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online. Experience with financial platforms such as Gusto, 
, RightTool, Uncat, etc. Strong experience performing month-end closes. Comfort working in cloud-based accounting environments. Willingness to test and adopt new software tools and applications. Updating workflow tasks daily and participating in daily standups (written updates and meetings).



Regular Tasks



Daily: Code accounting transactions. Respond to client questions. Resolve routine accounting software issues. Update workflow tasks. Provide written start-of-day and end-of-day updates.



Weekly: Complete reconciliations. Review accounting records for accuracy. Communicate with clients about financial activity.



Monthly: Complete month-end accounting work. Review financial statements. Prepare for and participate in client meetings.



Periodically: Assist with new client onboarding. Implement client-specific financial analysis tools. Identify opportunities to improve accounting processes.



Signals of Success in This Role



The person who does well in this role:



Takes ownership of client outcomes, not just assigned tasks Persists in finding clear answers to client questions. Works effectively through messy or incomplete financial situations. Communicates frequently and proactively with both clients and tea
mbers. Helps bring structure and clarity to complex financial information Is comfortable participating in challenging or complicated client conversations. Enjoys testing new technology, tools, and workflows that may help clients get better answers.



First 90 Days: What Success Looks Like



First 30 Days: You will become familiar with Agate's systems, tools, and workflows and develop an understanding of your assigned clients. You will be able to locate information, research prior-period activity, and respond to routine questions.



First 60 Days: You will independently manage day-to-day accounting work for your assigned clients, including coding transactions, reconciliations, month-end closes, bill pay, and payroll.



First 90 Days: You will be fully client-facing for your assigned clients. You will lead client meetings, explain financial statements clearly, and respond confidently to accounting-related client questions.



Hiring Process



Our hiring process is designed to ensure strong mutual fit.



1. Resume and questionnaire submission

2. Internal review of resume and questionnaire

3. Accounting simulation

4 Interview(s)

5. Background check

6. Offer

If this sounds like you, we look forward to hearing from you.



Apply Here

title: Sales & Production Coordinator – US Client Relations (Neutral Accent Required)
description:
Company: STX Promo | 
 



Location: Remote (Philippines-based) 



Work Hours: Full-Time, U.S. Day Shift (Philippine Overnight) + Light weekend inbox rotation 



Pay Range: $1,100–$1,500/month (Includes premium pay for U.S. hours / Night Shift. Starting rate depends on experience). 



Perks & Benefits: Paid Time Off (PTO), observed US Holidays, end-of-year/performance bonuses (13th-month), and massive room for long-term growth. (Adjust these to fit your exact offerings!)





About STX Promo & Our Growth



STX Promo helps businesses and organizations Step Up Their Setup with eye-catching custom canopies, table covers, flags, banners, and more. We work with small businesses, schools, and nonprofits across the U.S. to elevate their brand presence at events and trade shows.



We are growing incredibly fast. Over the last 10 months alone, we’ve added 4 people to our core team along with several specialized gig workers. As we gear up for our busiest season yet, our current Sales and Production Coordinator is handling a massive volume of orders. We are actively hiring a second full-time coordinator to jump into the trenches, split the workload, and help us maintain our pro-level communication and zero-hassle client experience.





About the Role: Your Impact



We need a highly organized, proactive Sales & Production Coordinator who specializes in Client and Vendor Relations and Process Optimization.



In this role, you are the crucial bridge between our U.S. clients, our internal design team, and our manufacturing suppliers.



Communication Split (80%
 / 20% Phone): While this role is heavily
-based (about 80% of your communication via Gmail and Live Chat), the other 20% will involve speaking directly with our U.S. clients and vendors over the phone. You must be able to confidently handle calls, troubleshoot issues, and provide a friendly, premium customer experience. Because of this, flawless spoken English and a clear, neutral accent are absolute requirements.





Key Responsibilities:



Workflow Optimization: Actively analyze and improve our backend processes using ClickUp, Shopify, and Gmail.



Client Relations (80/20 Split): Manage daily incoming sales and customer service
s/chats, and confidently handle inbound phone inquiries with a friendly, US-facing tone.



Vendor Management: Place precise orders through supplier portals, track delivery times, and troubleshoot delays directly with vendors.



Production Coordination: Collaborate heavily with our Graphic Design team to confirm print graphics and prepare files for handoff.



Workflow Tracking: Organize project priorities using ClickUp. Maintain organized client files within Google Drive.



Schedule & Light Weekend Rotation: Work a consistent Monday–Friday U.S. daytime schedule. You will split a light weekend inbox rotation with our current coordinator (you will not work every weekend) to ensure clients aren't left hanging and deals are closed quickly.





? You're a Great Fit If You Have:



Top-Tier English & Neutral Accent: Extensive experience working directly with U.S.-based clients over voice/phone (US BPO/Call Center experience is a massive plus). You must possess a strong understanding of American business communication and have a clear, neutral accent.



Operational Mindset: You are a problem solver who naturally looks for ways to make systems run smoother.



Vendor/Client Experience: A solid background in managing supplier relationships and keeping clients happy.



Extreme Attention to Detail: You must be hyper-vigilant when approving graphics and placing orders.



Grace Under Pressure: You thrive in a fast-paced environment and keep your cool during the "busy season."



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully):



To ensure your application stands out, you MUST submit the following two items. Applications missing either of these will be immediately deleted.



A Voice Intro (REQUIRED): Please provide a link to a 1-to-2-minute voice recording (you can use a free tool like 
). 



Introduce yourself, highlight your experience dealing with US clients on the phone, and tell us why you are a great fit for this role. We use this to evaluate your spoken English and "phone voice," so please speak naturally and confidently!



Your updated Resume/CV.



We look forward to hearing your intro and finding the next crucial member of our growing team!
