title: Full-Time Remote Bookkeeper
description:
We are seeking a highly meticulous and proactive Remote Bookkeeper to join our team on a full-time basis. This role is critical to our financial health and requires an individual who thrives on precision, operational oversight, and forward-thinking financial management.



The successful candidate will work within the EST Time Zone and will be responsible for ensuring the absolute integrity of our financial records while providing actionable insights to management.



Key Responsibilities and Non-Negotiables

Financial Accuracy and Attention to Detail

Verify all incoming invoices and approve bills with 100?curacy.



Ensure all ledger entries are correct; errors in cash flow or budget tracking are considered unacceptable.



Conduct regular reconciliations to maintain "audit-ready" books at all times.



Budget Management and Reporting

Track individual project budgets and monitor daily expenses against set limits.



Proactively alert management the 
nt spending exceeds or is projected to exceed established thresholds.



Generate clear, comprehensive, and timely reports regarding project-specific budgets and overall company cash flow.



Cash Flow Forecasting

Maintain a rolling 2-week forecast of upcoming payments and cash requirements.



Identify and flag potential shortfalls or liquidity issues well before they impact operations.



Proactivity and Operational Oversight

Actively monitor transactions beyond simple data entry (e.g., verifying that deposits have cleared and payments were processed successfully).



Take full initiative to resolve discrepancies and financial hurdles without requiring constant supervision.



Technical Proficiency

Demonstrate expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop, and Xero.



Exhibit strong digital literacy in managing financial data and preparing complex digital reports.



Communication and Collaboration

Provide regular, concise updates and financial insights to the management and operations teams.



Diligently follow up on pending items and outstanding documentation to ensure no financial task remains unfinished.

title: Graphic Designer / Production Artist
description:
DTF Virginia is seeking an experienced Graphic Designer / Production Artist who fully understands DTF production requirements, Roland workflows, and specialty-effect artwork. This position requires someone who can consistently deliver accurate, print-ready files without oversight or rework.



This role supports customers who submit artwork via
, requiring precise interpretation of specifications and flawless production execution.

Core Responsibilities (Daily Work)

• Create accurate, error-free gang sheets for customers who submit artwork via
, strictly following provided specifications (sizes, quantities, spacing, and layout).

• Vector, redraw, clean up, and improve customer artwork as needed.

• Prepare artwork specifically for DTF printing, including correct sizing, clean vectors, smooth edges, optimized paths, and production-safe line thickness.

• Identify and correct issues that could impact print quality or adhesion.

• Add clean, accurate cut lines for Roland print/cut workflows.

• Prepare fully print-ready files for Roland production with no downstream adjustments.

• Create and prepare spangle files for production use.

• Apply faux specialty effects including faux embroidery (digitized embroidery-style artwork), faux glitter, sparkle, textured, and 3D effects.

• Understand and apply digitizing principles when creating embroidery-style effects for print.

• Apply spot colors correctly for textured UV printing.

• Create clean, print-safe halftone artwork.

• Accurately replicate fonts when required.

• Deliver files that are complete, accurate, and print-ready upon receipt.

Required Skills & Experience

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (vector-based production workflow).

• Proven experience preparing artwork for DTF printing in a production environment.

• Strong understanding of Roland print/cut requirements.

• Hands-on experience with spangle files and specialty-effect artwork.

• Excellent attention to detail and production accuracy.

• Ability to work independently and manage deadlines.

• True design and production skills required – AI-generated artwork is not acceptable for this role.

Schedule & Expectations

Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM (East Coast hours).

This role requires minimal supervision.

Files must be correct the first time—accuracy is critical to production flow.

title: Video Editor Viral Short-Form Content / Reels - TikTok - YouTube Shorts
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY. LOOKING FOR A "WOW" EFFECT.



We are a creative media team working on two exciting projects: the launch campaign of an emerging music

artist and the promotional campaign for a feature film releasing in October. We are looking for talented

Filipino video editors who understand what makes content go viral on Western social media platforms and

can produce high-quality short-form videos consistently.



What you will be working on



You will edit short-form videos for two distinct campaigns running simultaneously:



MUSIC CAMPAIGN

Pairing songs of a new artist with fitting video clips

– animal footage, anime edits, epic cinematic

scenes, landscapes, emotional



The goal: organic virality that puts the music in

people's heads.





FILM CAMPAIGN

Creating appetite-building clips from film footage –

suspenseful cuts, emotional hooks, engaging

subtitles – designed to make people curious and

talk about the film before its October release 2026 in all german cinemas and on Netflix.





What we are looking for



 Strong instinct for what makes content go viral on Western platforms (TikTok US/EU,

Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



 Proficiency in at least one professional editing tool (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci

Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)



 Good PC/laptop and reliable internet connection – you must be able to handle video files and

deliver on time



 Ability to follow creative briefs and direction closely while bringing your own creative sense to

the execution



 Good English comprehension – you will receive instructions and feedback in English



? Available 4–6 hours per day, on a consistent schedule, for a duration of several months



Nice to have

Experience creating viral content yourself · Knowledge of current trends on Western TikTok /

Instagram Reels · Skills in subtitle styling and motion typography · Portfolio or examples of past edits

Compensation



Base rate: €4 EUR / hour 



Rate is performance-based and can go higher or lower depending on

quality, consistency, and results. 

Strong performers will be rewarded.



We are looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off.



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical editing test: we will send you raw video material

with us. If you have the eye and the drive, we want to hear from you

title: Landing Page Developer for DTC Ecommerce Brands (Replo/GemPages)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company working with multiple DTC brands to create high-converting landing pages and product pages. We're looking for a skilled Landing Page Developer who can take our Figma designs and turn them into pixel-perfect, lightning-fast Shopify pages using page builders like Replo or GemPages.



What you'll do:

• Develop landing pages, product pages, homepages, and advertorials in Shopify using Replo or GemPages

• Translate Figma designs into live pages as exact 1-to-1 replicas for both desktop and mobile

• Ensure all pages load fast and are fully optimized for page speed

• Integrate Shopify apps into pages (bundle apps, swatch apps, review widgets,
 capture forms)

• Write custom HTML, CSS, and Liquid code when page builders can't achieve the desired design or functionality

• Thoroughly self-test and QA every page before delivery, ensuring zero errors or layout issues

• Take on new projects weekly across multiple brands and occasionally update existing pages



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience developing Shopify pages using Replo or GemPages

• Ability to build pixel-perfect replicas of Figma designs on both desktop and mobile

• Strong understanding of page speed optimization on Shopify

• Experience integrating third-party Shopify apps into page builder layouts

• Custom coding skills (HTML, CSS, Liquid) to solve page builder limitations

• Extreme attention to detail in both design accuracy and functionality

• Self-sufficient QA process and experience working with DTC ecommerce brands



Nice to have:

• Experience with Shopify theme development or advanced Liquid customizations

• Familiarity with conversion rate optimization principles

• Experience working across multiple brands simultaneously



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'PageBuilder429'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Do you prefer working in Replo or GemPages, and why? What are the strengths and limitations of each in your experience?

2. How many hours would it take you to develop a mid-length product page from a completed Figma design into a fully functional page in a page builder? Walk us through how you estimate this.

3. What steps do you take to ensure that the pages you build load fast on Shopify? Which tools do you use to measure and optimize page speed?

4. What happens when a Figma design includes an element or interaction that is not natively possible in a page builder? Give a specific example of how you solved this with custom code.

5. Share a minimum of 3 to 5 links to live Shopify pages you have built using a page builder, with a brief explanation of your role in each project.

title: AI Automation Specialist - E-commerce (n8n, Make, Zapier)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company looking to supercharge our operations with AI automations. We need an AI automation specialist who can build powerful customer service automations and streamline our team's processes using the latest AI tools while also having the knowledge to custom code yourself.



What you'll do:

• Build and implement customer service automations

• Create workflow automations using n8n to optimize our team's daily processes

• Develop custom automations with Make, Zapier, Manus, Claude Code and more.

• Write custom code solutions when pre-built tools aren't enough

• Stay current with the newest AI tools and recommend implementations for our business

• Test, troubleshoot, and optimize automation workflows for maximum efficiency



What we're looking for:

• At least 6 months of hands-on AI automation experience

• Expert-level knowledge of n8n, Make, Zapier, Manus, and Claude Code

• Strong custom coding abilities (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

• Proven experience creating automations for e-commerce companies

• Deep understanding of customer service automation workflows

• Someone who actively follows and experiments with the latest AI tools



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AISpecialist'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk me through a specific CS automation you built for an e-commerce company using n8n. What triggers did you use, what APIs did you connect, and what was the end result?

2. Describe a complex workflow automation you created that required custom coding. What tools did you use, what code did you write, and how did it solve the problem?

3. What's the most recent AI tool you've experimented with in the past month, and how could it be applied to e-commerce automation?

4. Tell me about a time when pre-built automation tools weren't sufficient for a project. How did you approach building a custom solution?

5. Please share at least 3 automation examples you've created for e-commerce companies or customer service workflows. Include screenshots, workflow diagrams, or videos showing your n8n automations in action.

title: YouTube Expert Strategist Needed
description:
About us

We run a YouTube entertainment business across multiple channels. We have previously built a YouTube channel to over 300,000 subscribers, and we are now building new channels from scratch. 

We create highly engaging entertainment content and are looking for someone with strong, well-rounded YouTube experience who can support our CEO with the many different kinds of work that touch YouTube.



How you’ll work with us

The CEO leads the business. This role is not to run every part of the company alone, and not to personally own every single step of every video unless that’s what we agree together. 



We need someone who can assist the CEO with research, ideation, and judgment, bounce ideas, pressure-test concepts, and help us think through how to create content that is worthy of breaking out—including what strong performance and “viral potential” actually mean for our niches and channels.



You should understand YouTube from start to finish: how discovery and packaging work, what makes ideas strong or weak, and how to think about consistent, high-quality entertainment across multiple channels. 



You should be comfortable supporting both strategy and practical creation (e.g. research, outlines, packaging feedback), while recognizing the CEO makes the final calls.



What we’re looking for (in order of importance)

Deep YouTube expertise — Real experience across the full scope of YouTube work: research, content and packaging thinking, and how videos are planned and improved—not only one narrow task.



Ability to work with a founder/CEO — Clear communication, fast thinking, honest feedback, and real collaboration.



Bonus (valued, not required): Video editing and graphic design — we give extra consideration to candidates who can also deliver hands-on editing or visuals, but the core hire is YouTube judgment and expertise.



Requirements

Demonstrable YouTube experience — show channels, videos, or projects where you’ve had a real impact, and what you did.

Portfolio / links required — applications without relevant examples will not be considered.

Strong written English; short video calls when needed.

Reliable internet and professional communication.



Compensation

Negotiable — based on experience, expertise, and scope of responsibility (to be discussed with shortlisted candidates).

Hiring process



We will review applications, conduct interviews, and may invite finalists to a small paid test (brief and fair) so we can see how you think and work with us.



How to apply

IMPORTANT: Start your application subject line with the word YTEXPERT555 so we know you read this posting in full. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Please include:

1. Resume or CV

2 Portfolio / links — YouTube channels or videos relevant to your experience; note your role on each (required).

3. Your YouTube background — niches, types of content, and how you’ve helped build or improve channels or videos (metrics or outcomes if you can share them).

4. How you would support a CEO running multiple entertainment channels — short paragraph (a few sentences).

5. Your view on what makes YouTube content capable of going viral or breaking out — be specific; avoid generic motivational answers.

6. Rank your own skills (required) — For each item below, give one number from 1 to 10 (1 = weakest / least experience, 10 = strongest / most experience). Do not skip any line.

- Topic and trend research

- Script writing (hooks, structure, pacing)

- Thumbnail and packaging thinking (titles, thumbnails, concepts)

- Video editing

- Graphic design

7. Availability — timezone, hours per week, earliest start date.

8. Salary expectation — even though our offer is negotiable, share what you’re looking for in USD per month so we can align early.

title: AU Tax Accountant
description:
We believe our people are the foundation of our success. Our culture is built on respect, collaboration, and supporting one another.



We strive to create a workplace where employees feel valued, heard, and empowered to grow both personally and professionally. Our leadership is committed to fostering open communication, professional development, and a positive environment where everyone can perform at their best.



If you're looking for a company that values your contribution and supports your growth, we’d love to have you on our team.



Why Join Bravo?

We believe great people deserve great support. Here’s what you can expect when you join us:

-Competitive and stable full-time work from home opportunity

-HMO and Life Insurance coverage

-13th Month Pay

-Government Contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

-Sick Leave and Vacation Leave benefits

-Free Training and Professional Development opportunities

-Monthly Virtual Employee Engagement activities (with prizes!)

-Fun Company Get-Togethers

-An Annual Christmas Party that our team truly looks forward to

-Year-End Package



We make sure our team not only works hard, but also feels appreciated and celebrated.



About the Role

We are currently looking for four (4) experienced AU Tax Accountants to join our growing team.

In this role, you will work closely with an Australian firm handling tax compliance and accounting services for a diverse client base. This position offers the opportunity to further develop your expertise in Australian taxation while working in a supportive and collaborative environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Prepare and review Australian Tax Returns, BAS, and Financial Statements

-Ensure compliance with Australian tax regulations and legislation

-Provide tax planning support or advice to clients or internal stakeholders

-Analyze financial statements and provide insights where needed

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation



What We’re Looking For

-2–5+ years of Australian Tax and Business Services experience

-Ability to prepare tax returns for Individuals, Partnerships, Companies (including Group Companies), and Trusts

-Experience in preparing and reviewing Financial Statements

-Solid understanding of Australian tax legislation, including:

Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT)

Division 7A compliance and application

-Experience in preparing IAS and BAS

-Experience in tax planning is an advantage

-Strong analytical and communication skills

-Proficient in using Xero, XPM, and other accounting software

-Positive and proactive attitude with a fun team spirit

-Bookkeeping experience is a plus



If you're interested in this opportunity, feel free to apply through this job post or send your resume directly to 
 look forward to hearing from you!

title: Graphic Designer who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description: We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Graphic Designer’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via email. The job responsibilities include designing and creating engaging YouTube thumbnails, researching trending thumbnail styles, editing and enhancing images, organizing and maintaining a thumbnail archive, analyzing thumbnail performance, collaborating with the content team, ensuring brand consistency, and assisting with basic design tasks. Additionally, creativity, attention to detail, and collaboration skills are key to creating thumbnails that align with the brand and content strategy. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via email. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe

 job is full time (40 hours per week) with the opportunity to transition into a long term role, would start immediately, and is ongoing. title: Social Media And Strategy Manager - FT - Aussie Biz
description:
We are an established Australian trade services business looking for a full-time Social Media and Content Marketing VA.



This role is responsible for building and executing a social media strategy across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube. You will audit our existing channels and content library, develop a strategy grounded in real analysis, create and schedule content daily, manage comments and DMs, and report on performance each month. The business owner appears on camera - everything else is yours to own and execute.



If you have worked in digital marketing, content creation, social media management, or at a marketing agency - and you can point to specific accounts you have genuinely grown from a smaller base - we want to hear from you.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, stable role with a long-established Australian business

* Starting salary of PHP 33,500 per month during probation, increasing to PHP 35,000 per month after probation

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

* Coordinate with the owner for his on-camera video appearances - brief him on what is needed and handle everything else

* Respond to all comments and DMs daily across all platforms

* Pre-qualify or redirect social leads to the sales team where appropriate

* Track performance monthly and report clearly to the owner

* Provide content and UX input on two business websites (supporting role)



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience growing social media followings from a smaller base - you must be able to show numbers, not just titles

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE



* HubSpot or CRM experience

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Flexible hours

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.

title: Creative Research & Brand Operator (Personal Brand)
description:
Creative Research & Brand Operator (Personal Brand)

Starting 27,000/month Peso | Full-time | Long-term



APPLY HERE:





We're building a founder-led personal brand from the ground up—and we need someone who thinks like a brand strategist, not just a content poster.

This isn't about chasing trends or going viral. It's about understanding what makes great founder content work, refining voice and positioning, and turning raw ideas into clear, consistent content that actually resonates.

If you're obsessed with how the best founders show up online and want to learn brand-building properly, this role is for you.



What You'll Do:

> Social Media Research & Brand Intelligence (Your Core Focus)

- Study high-performing personal brands (founders, operators, creators)

- Break down what makes their content work: themes, messaging patterns, narrative angles, tone, positioning

- Identify what resonates organically (not surface-level trends)

- Build research summaries and idea banks

- Help refine the founder's messaging to stay clear, differentiated, and authentic

> Brand & Creative Direction Support

- Translate the founder's thoughts into structured content ideas

- Maintain consistency in tone, voice, and positioning across all platforms

- Shape how stories, opinions, and ideas are presented

- Think in terms of brand narrative, not just individual posts

> Content Creation (Execution Layer)

- Create Instagram carousel posts (clean, minimal, on-brand design)

- Structure content outlines and write captions

- Edit short-form videos for social media (authentic, founder-style—not overly produced)

- Basic long-form video editing using Descript (cuts, clarity, captions)

> Growth Tracking & Feedback Loops

- Track organic performance: reach, saves, follows, engagement

- Maintain content logs and tracking sheets

- Identify patterns in what performs well

- Use insights to inform future creative decisions (not just report numbers)



What This Role Is NOT:

? Not a senior creative director role (yet—but you can grow into it)

? Not about "going viral" or influencer tactics

? Not a generic social media VA position

? Not a plug-and-play content scheduler

This is a thinking-heavy role for someone who wants to learn brand-building properly.



You're the right fit if you:

- Are obsessed with personal brands and how founders build them

- Have strong taste and attention to detail

- Enjoy research, pattern recognition, and synthesis

- Want to grow into a senior creative/brand role over time

- Can work independently while staying aligned with brand vision



Compensation & Growth:

27,000/month starting rate

Philippine Work-hours

Performance-based raises after 60–90 days

Clear growth path to higher responsibility and pay as the brand scales

Long-term role (not project-based)

title: [URGENT] $50 Per Sale - US Fiber Infrastructure Outreach (Government-Backed)
description:
Job Description:

Poyo Group LLC is looking for 2-3 elite outbound "hunters" for a long-term US telecom project. We are transitioning American businesses from old, insecure copper lines to 2-Gig Fiber.



Why this is an easy close for you:

There is a mandatory US push to move businesses to fiber by 2028. Because of this, the state is covering the installation costs and the first 2 months for the business.



You aren't selling. You are updating them on their eligibility.



NO Credit Cards required from the customer.



NO Contracts.



Free 60-Day Trial.



Compensation:



$50.00 USD per successful installation.



Paid weekly via Wise or Direct Deposit.



Top reps can easily hit 5+ installs per week ($250/week) once they master the script.



The Mission:

The old copper lines are physically degrading and unsecure. Your job is to call business owners, explain the 2028 infrastructure mandate, and get them enrolled in the 60-day pilot program so they can test the speed for themselves.



Requirements:



Excellent, clear English (No thick accents).



Must have a noise-canceling headset and backup power (no power outage excuses).



Willing to work US EST hours.



How to Apply:



Send a link to a 30-second voice recording. No recording = No interview.



Tell me about your experience with US Cold Calling.

title: Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)
description:
Job Title



Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)



Overview



We’re hiring a reliable Social Media Growth Manager to run day-to-day social execution across a small portfolio of UK brands:

 • Medica Universal (GP-led healthcare + weight loss) - Medica.Universal (IG)

 • Rosetta Property Company (UK property investment + HMOs + short-term rentals) - RosettaProperties (IG)

 • Dr Perminder (personal brand content: health, business, and leadership)

 • Moonstar Media (creative/content brand supporting video, storytelling, and production)



This is an execution role with clear SLAs. You will work in ClickUp, follow workflows, publish consistently, and report weekly. You will also repurpose SEO blogs into newsletters and social assets.



Hours (UK time)



10 hours/week to start, with fixed daily cover windows required.

Hours are expected to increase over the next 2–3 months if performance is strong.



Pay



Base: $4/hr

Performance add-ons available (based on outputs, reliability, KPIs, and growth metrics)



Non-Negotiables

 • ClickUp is the source of truth (no WhatsApp-only working)

 • Weekly output targets and reporting are mandatory

 • Clear communication and reliability are essential



Core Responsibilities

 1. Content execution + scheduling



 • Build and maintain a weekly content plan

 • Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn (and other platforms as assigned)

 • Keep a clean content calendar with deadlines and approvals



 2. Community management + engagement



 • Respond to comments and DMs within agreed response windows

 • Use templates/SOPs to follow up leads and move them to booking/enquiry steps



 3. Meta Ads support (important)



 • Set up and manage basic Meta campaigns (lead form + traffic + retargeting) OR support and coordinate ads delivery if you are not fully advanced

 • Track spend, leads, CPL, and outcomes

 • Report performance weekly with clear next steps



 4. Repurposing workflow (important)



 • Convert approved SEO blogs into:

 • newsletters 
 format)

 • carousels (6–10 slides)

 • short captions and posts

 • Follow our templates and workflow (brief ? draft ? approval ? schedule ? report)



 5. Weekly reporting



 • Submit a weekly report every Friday (what shipped + metrics + what’s next)



SLAs (must agree)

 • ClickUp updates: every assigned task must have “Next step + ETA” (no reactions-only updates)

 • Response time: acknowledge messages within 24 hours on working days (within cover windows faster)

 • Weekly deliverables:

 • content plan posted in ClickUp by Monday 12pm UK

 • minimum 5-10 posts scheduled/published per week (platform split agreed)

 • engagement log updated

 • weekly report by Friday 5pm UK



Tools you must use

 • ClickUp (task management)

 • Google Drive (assets/SOPs)

 • Meta Business Suite

Bonus: Canva, Mailchimp/Klaviyo (or similar), basic analytics



Application Instructions (important)



Start your application with the word: Workflow



Include:

 1. Confirmation you accept $4/hr base + performance add-ons

 2. Your fixed weekly availability in UK time (must include daily cover windows)

 3. Two examples of accounts/content you managed (links)

 4. Meta Ads experience: Yes/No. If yes, include results (spend, leads, CPL, ROAS if applicable)



Answer these 3 questions:

A) How would you turn an SEO blog into (1) a newsletter and (2) a 6-slide carousel?

B) What does your weekly report include (exact headings)?

C) Confirm you will work in ClickUp and follow SLAs (Yes/No)



Applications without “Workflow” will not be considered.

title: Quality Assurance Specialist (Home Health)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced Clinical Documentation & Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist to support our Home Health Agency. The ideal candidate must have a strong knowledge of clinical documentation, home health regulations, and quality standards (OASIS, CMS, CoPs). This role ensures accuracy, compliance, and completeness of all patient records and supports the agency in delivering high-quality care.



Key Responsibilities

1. Clinical Documentation Review

Review all clinical notes (SN, PT, OT, ST, MSW, HHA) for accuracy, completeness, and compliance.

Ensure documentation reflects medical necessity, skilled services, and the Plan of Care (POC).

Audit OASIS assessments for accuracy and congruency with patient condition and visit notes.

Ensure timely submission of documentation per agency standards.



2. Chart Audits & Compliance

Conduct routine chart audits for SOC, Recertification, ROC, Transfers, and Discharges.

Ensure all required documents are present (physician orders, consents, supplemental orders, POCs).

Monitor visit frequency, discipline coordination, and regulatory timelines.

Identify deficiencies and provide corrective action guidance.



3. Quality Improvement Activities

Participate in the agency’s QAPI program.

Track and analyze QA metrics (infections, hospitalizations, falls, adverse events, missed visits).

Assist in identifying trends and implementing improvement plans.



4. Staff Education & Support

Support clinicians with documentation, POC, orders, and compliance-related questions.



5. Coordination & Communication

Collaborate with the care team and administrative staff to ensure alignment with QA standards.

Communicate QA findings professionally with recommendations for correction.

Follow up to ensure timely completion of revisions and updates.



6. Other Duties

Assist with preparation for state surveys and accreditation visits.

Review and update QA-related policies and procedures.

Participate in case conferences as needed.



Monthly Rate: P18,000 starting



Equipment:

• Laptop or desktop computer

• Stable internet connection

• Webcam

• Headset/earphones



If you are passionate about accurate documentation, quality care, and supporting a high-performing healthcare team, we encourage you to apply.



Kindly submit your resume with the subject title “Home Health QA”.

Send your application to:

title: Senior Fashion Designer (High-End / Embellished Collections)
description:
We are an international fashion company, active across Asia, Europe, and the USA, building a strong high-end fashion brand.



We are looking for a true fashion designer.

Someone with vision, structure, and the ability to execute at the highest level.



This role focuses on the development of high-end, embellished collections, from concept to production.



?



Your role:

 • Design complete collections (not isolated pieces)

 • Develop strong silhouettes, cuts, and proportions

 • Create and direct embellished pieces (beading, embroidery, textures)

 • Define and maintain a consistent creative direction

 • Build full technical packs / technical sheets (measurements, construction, details)

 • Select and develop color palettes and fabric combinations

 • Ensure designs are production-ready and coherent as a collection

 • Work closely with production to bring designs to life



?



Creative direction:



High-end. Bold. Provocative.

Very fashion-forward.



We are not looking for safe design.

We are looking for identity, precision, and impact.



?



Who you are:

 • You see yourself as a fashion designer, not just a technician

 • You can design and structure an entire collection

 • You have a strong sense of color, balance, and composition

 • You understand embellishments, fabrics, and detailing

 • You combine creativity with technical accuracy

 • You think in terms of collections, not individual pieces



?



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in fashion design (preferably women’s high-end fashion)

 • Strong portfolio with high-end / embellished work

 • Ability to create technical packs (tech packs)

 • Strong knowledge of construction, fabrics, and finishing

 • Good understanding of color development and fabric selection

 • Ability to deliver structured and consistent work

title: B2B Cold Caller (US Market)
description:
APPLY HERE:

APPLY HERE:

APPLY HERE:





About Us: We are Gushwork.ai — one of the fastest-growing AI marketing startups backed by global investors like Lightspeed, B Capital, and SIG. We help U.S based B2B manufacturing companies grow through AI-powered websites and SEO.

We are building a high-performance outbound sales team that books qualified meetings with decision-makers across the U.S.



The Role:

This is NOT a call center/Customer Support role.



We are hiring experienced B2B SaaS SDRs who have consistently booked meetings in the U.S. market and understand outbound sales at a strategic level.

title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 350 – 500 per hour

Employment Type: Part-time

Required Experience: 1-2 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



What You'll Do



As a Video Editor, you will help create engaging video content used for advertising, marketing, and social media campaigns.

Your responsibilities may include:

• Editing raw footage into engaging short-form videos

• Adding captions, transitions, music, and basic graphics

• Repurposing long-form videos into shorter clips for social media

• Optimizing videos for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

• Collaborating with the marketing team to produce content for campaigns

• Organizing video assets and maintaining editing files



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for someone who has basic to intermediate video editing skills and is passionate about creating engaging digital content.



You should have experience or knowledge in:

• Video editing using tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar software

• Editing short-form videos for social media

• Adding captions, simple motion graphics, and transitions

• Understanding pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Optimizing videos for social media formats and platforms

• Basic audio editing and background music integration



You do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable learning new editing techniques and improving your skills.



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



• A recent graduate or early-career creative professional

• Has 1–2 years of experience in video editing or content creation

• Creative and has a good eye for storytelling and visuals

• Familiar with social media video trends

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Able to work remotely and meet deadlines

• Interested in building a long-term career in digital content and marketing



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital



• Fully remote work setup

• Competitive hourly pay

• Opportunity to work on real marketing campaigns

• Build a strong video editing portfolio

• Work with a growing digital marketing team



If you're passionate about video editing, digital content, and creative storytelling, we would love to hear from you.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Property Manager – Short-Term Rentals
description:
Property Manager – Short-Term Rentals

Bali & Australia | Remote | Long-Term Role



We manage premium short-term rentals across Bali and Australia and are hiring an experienced Property Manager to oversee day-to-day operations.



This role starts part-time (10–15 hours per week) with a clear pathway to full-time within 2–3 months for the right person.



Before You Apply – Please Read Carefully

- This is not an entry-level role

- Guesty + OTA experience is mandatory

- You must be confident handling guest issues independently

- This is a long-term role with growth opportunities



If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply.



The Role

As Property Manager, you will be responsible for the day-to-day operational performance of our portfolio — ensuring listings run smoothly, guests are well looked after, and on-the-ground teams are prepared and aligned.



Key responsibilities include:



- Managing live listings across Airbnb, 
, VRBO/Stayz and other OTAs

- Handling guest communication from enquiry through to post check-out

- Coordinating housekeeping and maintenance teams

- Scheduling cleans, maintenance tasks and urgent call-outs

- Ensuring properties meet high cleanliness and presentation standards

- Troubleshooting guest issues calmly and professionally

- Supporting daily operations and administration, including:



- Managing
s

- Filing and sorting

- Sending invoices to accounts

- Uploading receipts to Hubdoc and Guesty for properties and the business

- Creating, refining and implementing SOPs to streamline operations (this is a key part of the role)



What We’re Looking For

This is not a junior role. We are looking for someone who understands the short-term rental industry and thrives in a fast-moving environment.



You must have:



- 3+ years’ experience in short-term rental, hotel or accommodation management

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong problem-solving skills and calm decision-making under pressure

- Experience managing contractors (cleaners, maintenance, trades)

- High attention to detail and pride in quality standards

- Strong organisation and time-management skills

- Must be efficient

- Confidence handling guest complaints and sensitive situations

- Ability to follow systems and improve them

- Availability to respond to urgent matters when required



Industry knowledge required:



- Solid understanding of Australian and/or Asian STR markets

- Awareness of guest expectations in premium or luxury accommodation



Software & Platform Experience (Essential)

You must be confident with:



- Guesty

- OTA setup and management

- Airbnb, 
, VRBO / Stayz, Expedia, Marriott Homes, 
 and others

-  WhatsApp (daily operational communication)



No Guesty + OTA experience = do not apply.



Bonus (not essential):



- SuiteOp experience



Hours, Pay & Growth



- Start: 10–15 hours per week

- Progression: Full-time role within approximately 2–3 months (performance-based)

- USD $7-8 per hour (reviewed as the role expands)

-  Schedule: Flexible, with some responsiveness required outside standard hours



This is a long-term position for someone looking to grow with the business.



How to Apply (Important)

To be considered, please submit all of the following:



1. Resume

   Highlight relevant STR, hotel or property management experience.



2. Short Video Introduction (Priority)

   Please tell us:



* Who you are

* Your STR experience

* Why this role interests you



Applications with a video will be prioritised.



3. Written responses to the questions below

   Detailed, structured answers are required. Short or vague responses will not be considered.



4. Tell us about a time a guest complained about cleaning standards. What steps did you take from complaint to resolution, and how did you prevent it from happening again?



5. A guest reports an urgent issue at 11:30pm (e.g. no hot water or AC failure). Walk us through exactly what you would do, step-by-step.



6. You notice a property has received two 4-star reviews in a row due to small maintenance issues. What actions would you take operationally and strategically?



7. This role involves building and improving SOPs. Share an example of a process or system you’ve created or improved. What problem did it solve and what was the outcome?



30-day paid trial applies.



Applications that do not answer all questions will not be considered.



Final filter

To confirm you have read this post carefully, start your application with the words:



I have Guesty + OTA experience.

title: Automation & Systems Integrator (n8n, CRM, APIs, WhatsApp)
description:
About the Role



We are a short-term rental management company (Nova Escapes) operating across Bali and Australia.



We have an existing automation and integration system partially built (n8n, CRM, WhatsApp, payments), and we are looking for someone to step in, complete key integrations, and get the system working end-to-end.



This is a project-based role, not full-time employment.

We are looking for someone who can deliver outcomes, not ongoing dependency.



Scope (Phase 1 – Immediate Work)



We need someone to complete and stabilise the following:

- Set up and finalise CRM pipelines and automations (GoHighLevel)

- Connect WhatsApp API and enable messaging flows

- Integrate Guesty with CRM and WhatsApp

- Connect Xendit (Payment processor) to SuiteOp and Guesty for payment links and workflows

- Integrate SuiteOp for guest experience triggers

- Set up Slack notifications for internal team



The goal is a simple, working system — not over-engineered.



First Task (Paid Trial)

The first task will be:

- Review our current n8n workflows and system setup

- Identify what is working vs broken

- Fix key issues and complete core integrations

- Get one end-to-end flow working (lead ? CRM ? WhatsApp ? payment)



You should be able to clearly explain:

- what you would check first

- what you would fix first

- how you would simplify the system



Current Stack:

- Guesty (PMS)

- GoHighLevel (CRM)

- SuiteOp (Guest Portal and Tasks)

- n8n (automation)

- WhatsApp API (in progress)

- Xendit, Stripe, Merchant Warrior (payments)

- Slack (not setup yet)

- Google  

- Dropbox



What We’re Looking For

- Strong experience with automation tools (n8n, Make, APIs, webhooks)

- Experience building CRM pipelines and automation flows

- Ability to connect multiple systems end-to-end

- Comfortable reviewing and improving an existing system (not starting from scratch)

- Able to debug and fix broken workflows (not just build from scratch)

- Able to work with incomplete or messy systems and bring clarity

- Experience with AI integrations (e.g. OpenAI, Gemini, chatbots, or AI workflows)

- Ability to implement simple, practical AI use cases (not over-engineered systems)

- Strong focus on getting systems working first, then layering AI where useful

- Focus on simplicity, reliability, and execution



Not The Right Fit

- Web developers or designers

- Anyone without API / integration experience

- Anyone who over-engineers or builds unnecessary complexity



Engagement

- Start with a paid audit + implementation (20–30 hours)

title: COO/Management Residential Appraisal Report Writer
description:
We are a successful residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California. We employ over 10 on the team and are looking for a very senior level experienced residential appraisal report writer to lead our team.



The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for someone with experience completing the entire report, including commentary, who ideally has experience with managing and leading other appraisal report writers. Your role will effectively be acting as chief operating officer of our company while also being directly involved in reports.



Your role and responsibilities include the following:

1. Ensuring every report is completed to our standards. Either directly or through the processes and procedures you develop, it will be your responsibility to ensure that each and every report created by our report writers is free from errors and submission-ready. While this will start by having you directly review each report written by our team before submission, we are in the process of also hiring quality assurance reviewers, who you will lead and manage.

2. Training and managing residential report writers. It will be your responsibility to ensure that all report writers on our tea
et the criteria and standards in place to ensure high quality reports. 

3. Acting as the liaison between leadership and the report writing staff. If there is too much work for the team, you will be in charge of letting leadership know so that additional tea
mbers can be hired. Or if there are any other issues, you will be in charge of resolving them or bringing it to leadership's attention.

4. Acting as the closer. Ultimately, everything on the report writing side will fall under your responsiblity. We are looking for someone who is proactive at solving problems without getting the leadership team involved, however we are of course readily available to help out when needed. In line with this, if the report writing team doesn't have capacity to complete a residential report, you are expected to directly help out and complete these reports while at the same time working towards a solution to address this issue (hiring more, building better processes for writing reports, involving AI, etc).



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have extensive work history writing reports for a US residential appraiser. Ideally you have done this for California properties. You must have extensive experience completing the entire report, everything from data entry to sketch to adjustments, 1004MC, selecting comparables, and commentary.

2. Ideally you have existing management experience, managing other appraisal report writers.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.

9. Do you have experience in reviewing other residential reports? If so, please discuss in detail your responsibilities. 



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

title: Shopify Developer & Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
Job Title: Shopify Developer & Ecommerce Operations Manager

Location: AWST - Local Manilla Timezone

Type: Negotiable based on Candidate



About Us

We are an international fashion brand in hyper-growth, working with top industry agencies. Join our Australian-based team during local hours and help shape premium customer experiences at an exciting time for the brand.



About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled Shopify Developer & Ecommerce Operations Manager to take full ownership of our online store, from technical development to end-to-end operational management. This is a hands-on, strategic role where Shopify development and operational excellence are core responsibilities.



You will ensure our Shopify store is high-performing, visually compelling, and fully integrated with all operational systems, including inventory, fulfillment, and customer service workflows. You will also implement automation solutions that streamline processes and enhance the customer experience.



Core Responsibilities

Shopify Development & Technical Management (Primary Focus)

Build, customise, and maintain Shopify themes, templates, and pages

Implement new design themes, landing pages, and content sections for campaigns or seasonal updates

Optimise site performance, speed, and UX across desktop and mobile devices

Ensure Shopify functionality, checkout, and all integrations are reliable and error-free

Manage app integrations (loyalty, reviews, bundling, subscriptions, upsells) and maintain compatibility with updates

Troubleshoot technical issues and implement ongoing enhancements to improve conversion and usability

Collaborate with marketing and creative teams to implement campaign-specific Shopify updates



Ecommerce Operations & End-to-End Solutions

Manage products, pricing, collections, and inventory with accuracy and consistency in Shopify

Develop & manage supply chain integrations & solutions for inventory tracking and PI to logistics platforms 

Implement customer service systems and automation to enhance responsiveness and efficiency

Monitor orders, track fulfillment, resolve operational issues, and ensure smooth end-to-end order flow

Maintain overall site health and operational reliability, ensuring minimal downtime or errors

Identify process bottlenecks and implement technology-driven solutions to streamline operations

Support scaling initiatives by integrating Shopify with CRM, ERP, and other backend systems



Qualifications



3+ years of Shopify development experience (theme builds, templates, page creation, apps integration)

Strong technical skills in Shopify Liquid, HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript

Deep understanding of ecommerce workflows, inventory management, and supply chain processes

Experience with customer service system integrations, automation, and multi-channel order management

Familiarity with Shopify apps and third-party integrations (loyalty, subscriptions, reviews, upsells, bundling)

Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously

Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with creative, marketing, and external partners



Why Join Us



Lead technical and operational development of a premium ecommerce store

Drive improvements that directly impact revenue, customer experience, and operational efficiency

Collaborate cross-functionally with creative, marketing, and agency teams

Opportunity to design and implement end-to-end automated workflows for ecommerce operations

Play a key role in scaling the business with technical and operational excellence

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Sales Agent — EdTech (Private Schools)
description:
About The Math Wiz



The Math Wiz (
) is an online math learning platform for Filipino elementary students (Grades 1–6). Built on Singapore Math methodology and fully aligned to the DepEd MATATAG curriculum, it gives schools a turnkey digital math program — video lessons, interactive quizzes with full solutions, and self-paced learning on any device.





The Role



You will approach private elementary schools in your city and pitch The Math Wiz as a school-wide annual subscription. Schools bundle the subscription into their student fees and earn a margin — so you're not asking schools to spend money, you're showing them a new revenue line.



This is a field sales role. You'll visit schools, meet principals and academic coordinators, and walk them through how the platform works. We provide all materials — a school-facing booklet, pitch scripts, phone scripts, and a step-by-step sales playbook.





Commission Structure



On top of the wage, there will be a commission structure designed for serious earning potential:



Year 1: 70% of collected revenue from every school you sign

Year 2 onwards: 10% perpetual renewal commission for every year that school stays subscribed



This is not a one-time payout. Every school you close becomes a recurring income stream. Sign 5 schools and you have passive renewal income coming in every year with no additional work.





How Your Commission Is Protected



You won't be pitching one school at a time. You'll be working a pipeline of multiple schools simultaneously, each at a different stage of the sales process. By the time your first school signs, you'll have several others already warmed up and in progress.



This means our incentives are fully aligned. If we don't pay your commission on school #1, you walk — and we lose every other school you've been building relationships with. The cost of not paying you far outweighs the cost of paying you. Your pipeline is your leverage.



On top of that, all commission terms are documented in a formal Sales Agent Agreement before you start.





Example Earnings



One school with 200 students at ?800/student/year = ?160,000 collected

Your Year 1 commission = ?112,000

Your renewal commission every year after = ?16,000

Scale that to 5 schools and the numbers speak for themselves.





Requirements



Based in Metro Manila, Cebu City, or Davao City

Sales experience (field sales, B2B, or direct selling preferred)

Confident approaching schools and speaking with principals and administrators

Can work independently and manage your own schedule

Has own transportation for school visits

Fluent in Filipino and English





What We Provide



Professional school-facing booklet and sales agent booklet

Phone scripts and in-person pitch scripts

Step-by-step sales playbook with a proven multi-touch approach

Ongoing support and coordination from the founder directly





How to Apply



Apply through this listing. Tell us which city you're based in and briefly describe your sales experience. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short Zoom call to walk through the opportunity in detail.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Flexible Hours, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: 
tion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f
ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.
